							</values>
						</ValueSet>
						<ValueSet version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:Types_of_AccessRightAssignment" classOfValues="TypeOfAccessRightAssignment">
							<Name>Types of Access Right Assignment</Name>
							<values>
								<TypeOfAccessRightAssignment version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:eligible">
									<Name>Eligible for a product or discount</Name>
								</TypeOfAccessRightAssignment>
								<TypeOfAccessRightAssignment version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:can_access">
									<Name>Grants access rights to use or travel on</Name>
								</TypeOfAccessRightAssignment>
								<TypeOfAccessRightAssignment version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:condition_of_use">
									<Name>Defines a condition or restriction on use</Name>
								</TypeOfAccessRightAssignment>
							</values>
						</ValueSet>
					</typesOfValue>
					<organisations>
						<!--- =====Agency========= -->
						<Operator version="any" id="mybus:DTA">
							<Name>Demo Transit Authority</Name>
						</Operator>
					</organisations>
				</ResourceFrame>
			</frames>
		</CompositeFrame>
	</dataObjects>
</PublicationDelivery>

label: Bus SimpleFares PointToPoint MultipleOffers
xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!-- ==== Simple Point to Point Fare with  different media offers  Example ====== 
This example shows the encoding of a point to point tariff for a simple bus timetable for a linear route in NeTex XML  
    
There are separate packages for with different prices for paper and mobile tickets

There are separate prices for first and second class  

Data is Fictional 

(C) CEN & Crown Copyright 2018, 2019 
Free to use under a Creative Commons license.

v1.1 Revised & corrected to use Tariff and simpler ids

===================================================
 
1. OVERVIEW
============

 Network  has just one line with  three stops         A - B  - C   
 
Point to point  Fare matrix

From To	Adult Price    
						A	    B 				C
    A   		 -			A_B	      	 A_C
    B		 	-			-			     B_C
	C			 -			-					-

paper ticket
			From To	Adult Price   Child price     1st Class
DME1:   	A  B		1.00 EUR		50%				1.50 EUR	
DME2   	A  C		3.00 EUR		50%				5.00 EUR	
DME3:		B  C		2.00 EUR		50%				3.00 EUR	

mobile app
			From To	Adult Price   Child price     1st Class
DME1:   	A  B		0.90 EUR		50%				1.40 EUR	
DME2   	A  C		2.70 EUR		50%				4.80 EUR	
DME3:		B  C		1.90 EUR		50%				280 EUR	
	
==================================
2. DETAILS

There is one LINE :  mybus:LN_24 on which the fare is valid   this is assigned  to a GROUP OF LINES 

SCHEDULED STOP POINTs
	    A)   mybus:ssp_001  Alpha						 
		B)  mybus:ssp_002   Bravo							 
		C)  mybus:ssp_077	 Charley

TARIFF   There is a single tariff:   myfares:PointToPoint

The fare structure has fiur  elements 

   (i) FARESTRUCTURE ELEMENT myfares:PointToPoint@access
 
      There are DISTANCE  MATRIX ELEMENTs for each origin /destination
		AB  DISTANCE  MATRIX ELEMENT: myfares:SSP_001+SSP_002 
		AC  DISTANCE  MATRIX ELEMENT: myfares:SSP_001+SSP_077 
		BC  DISTANCE  MATRIX ELEMENT: myfares:SSP_002+SSP_077 


   (ii) FARESTRUCTURE ELEMENT myfares:PointToPoint@eligibility
 
       There is a GENERIC PARAMETER ASSIGNMENT  with a choice of two parameters
			   USER PROFILE  myfares:adult
			USER PROFILE  myfares:child 

   (iii) FARESTRUCTURE ELEMENT myfares:PointToPoint@classes_of_use

 There is a GENERIC PARAMETER ASSIGNMENT  with a choice of two parameters
			  CLASSES OF USE   myfares:standard
			 CLASSES OF USE   myfares:fisrt
  
     
   (iiv FARE STRUCTURE ELEMENT myfares:PointToPoint@conditions_of_use
		ROUND TRIP :  myfares:PointToPoint@conditions_of_travel@trip  Single
		FREQUENCY OF USE   myfares:PointToPoint@conditions_of_travel@frequency"> single use 
        INTERCHANGING 	 myfares:PointToPoint@conditions_of_travel@interchanging  not allowed
 
There is a SINGLE FARE PRODUCT myfares:Single_trip
      It has a VALIDABLE ELEMENT    myfares:Single_trip@travel  that references  the four FARE STRUCTURE ELEMENTs

There are  two SALES OFFER PACKAGEs, one for printed tickets, one for mobbiles; they use teh same fare PRODUCTs that use the same TARIFF of FARE STRUCTURE ELEMENts

   SALES OFFER PACKAGEs myfares:Single_trip-SOP@p-ticket
      It has a SALES OFFER PACKAGE ELEMENT     myfares:Single_trip-SOP@p-ticket  that references   SINGLE FARE PRODUCT myfares:Single_trip
       it uses TYPE OF TRAVEL DOCUMENT paper myfares:paper_ticket"
   SALES OFFER PACKAGEs myfares:Single_trip-SOP@m-ticket
      It has a SALES OFFER PACKAGE ELEMENT     myfares:Single_trip-SOP@m-ticket  that references   SINGLE FARE PRODUCT myfares:Single_trip
       it uses TYPE OF TRAVEL DOCUMENT paper myfares:mobile_app
 
  There is a FARE TABLE  myfares:Line_1 containg sub FARETABLEs to  organise fare prices by SALES OFFER PACKAGE /  CLASS OF USE / DISTANCE MATRIX ELEMENT

     There  a price for each DISTANCE  MATRIX ELEMENT
		AB  DISTANCE  MATRIX ELEMENT: myfares:SSP_001+SSP_002
				FARE STRUCTURE ELEMENT PRICE:  myfares:SSP_001+SSP_002   1.00 EUR

		AC  DISTANCE  MATRIX ELEMENT: myfares:SSP_001+SSP_077
				FARE STRUCTURE ELEMENT PRICE:  myfares:SSP_001+SSP_077   3.00 EUR

		BC  DISTANCE  MATRIX ELEMENT: myfares:SSP_002+SSP_077
				FARE STRUCTUR ELEMENT PRICE:  myfares:SSP_002+SSP_077   2.00 EUR
     
  
A COMPOSITE FRAME is used to group the component FRAMEs
 
   - It has a VALIDITY CONDITION  that specifies it is valid between hiven dates
		A SERVICE  FRAME is used to contain the STOP POINT  elements   LINE, etc
		A FARE FRAME is used to contain  the FARE   product  elements 
		A separate  FARE FRAME is used to contain  the FARE   price  elements 
		 A RESOURCE FRAME is used to contain  common code values 
 
-->
<PublicationDelivery xmlns="http://www.netex.org.uk/netex" xmlns:siri="http://www.siri.org.uk/siri" xmlns:gml="http://www.opengis.net/gml/3.2" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" version="1.0" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.netex.org.uk/netex ../../../xsd/NeTEx_publication.xsd">
	<PublicationTimestamp>2010-12-17T09:30:47.0Z</PublicationTimestamp>
	<ParticipantRef>SYS001</ParticipantRef>
	<!--- ======WHAT WAS REQUESTED ========== -->
	<PublicationRequest version="1.0">
		<RequestTimestamp>2010-12-17T09:30:47.0Z</RequestTimestamp>
		<ParticipantRef>SYS002</ParticipantRef>
		<topics>
			<NetworkFrameTopic>
				<selectionValidityConditions>
					<AvailabilityCondition version="any" id="hde:range">
						<FromDate>2011-01-01T00:00:00Z</FromDate>
					</AvailabilityCondition>
				</selectionValidityConditions>
				<FareFrameRef ref="myfares:FF01">REQUEST</FareFrameRef>
			</NetworkFrameTopic>
		</topics>
	</PublicationRequest>
	<PublicationRefreshInterval>P1M</PublicationRefreshInterval>
	<Description>Example  of simple point to point fares</Description>
	<!--- =============== RESULTS =========== -->
	<dataObjects>
		<CompositeFrame version="1" id="myfares:DTA@Line24">
			<validityConditions>
				<ValidBetween>
					<FromDate>2011-01-01T00:00:00Z</FromDate>
					<ToDate>2011-07-01T00:00:00Z</ToDate>
				</ValidBetween>
			</validityConditions>
			<!--- ======= CODESPACEs======== -->
			<codespaces>
				<Codespace id="mybus">
					<Xmlns>mybus</Xmlns>
					<XmlnsUrl>http://www.mybuses.eu/stuff</XmlnsUrl>
					<Description>My buses</Description>
				</Codespace>
				<Codespace id="myfares">
					<Xmlns>myfares</Xmlns>
					<XmlnsUrl>http://www.myfares,com/fares</XmlnsUrl>
					<Description>Fare data</Description>
				</Codespace>
			</codespaces>
			<!--- =======FRAME DEFAULTS======== -->
			<FrameDefaults>
				<DefaultCodespaceRef ref="myfares"/>
				<DefaultCurrency>EUR</DefaultCurrency>
			</FrameDefaults>
			<frames>
				<ServiceFrame version="1.0" id="mybus:DTA@Line24@network">
					<Name>Stops for Winter timetable for route 24 </Name>
					<prerequisites>
						<ResourceFrameRef version="1.0" ref="mybus:DTA@Common_resources"/>
					</prerequisites>
					<!--- =========LINEs=========== -->
					<lines>
						<Line version="any" id="mybus:LN_24">
							<Name>Line 24 Alpha to Charley</Name>
							<PublicCode>24</PublicCode>
							<OperatorRef version="any" ref="mybus:DTA"/>
						</Line>
					</lines>
					<!--- === GROUPs OF LINEs ========= -->
					<groupsOfLines>
						<GroupOfLines version="any" id="mybus:my_lines">
							<Name>Express routes</Name>
							<members>
								<LineRef version="any" ref="mybus:LN_24"/>
							</members>
						</GroupOfLines>
					</groupsOfLines>
					<!--- =========STOP POINTs============ -->
					<scheduledStopPoints>
						<ScheduledStopPoint version="any" id="mybus:SSP_001">
							<Name>Alpha & Castle</Name>
							<Location>
								<Longitude>53.0000</Longitude>
								<Latitude>0.1000</Latitude>
							</Location>
							<ShortName>Alpha</ShortName>
							<PublicCode>ALPH</PublicCode>
						</ScheduledStopPoint>
						<ScheduledStopPoint version="any" id="mybus:SSP_002">
							<Name>Bravo Street</Name>
							<Location>
								<Longitude>53.2000</Longitude>
								<Latitude>0.2000</Latitude>
							</Location>
							<ShortName>Bravo</ShortName>
							<PublicCode>BRAV</PublicCode>
						</ScheduledStopPoint>
						<ScheduledStopPoint version="any" id="mybus:SSP_077">
							<Name>Charley Crescent</Name>
							<Location>
								<Longitude>53.3000</Longitude>
								<Latitude>0.3000</Latitude>
							</Location>
							<ShortName>Charley</ShortName>
							<PublicCode>CHAS</PublicCode>
						</ScheduledStopPoint>
					</scheduledStopPoints>
				</ServiceFrame>
				<!--- =============== FAREs =========== -->
				<FareFrame version="1.0" id="myfares:DTA@Line24@products">
					<prerequisites>
						<ServiceFrameRef version="1.0" ref="mybus:DTA@Line24@network"/>
					</prerequisites>
					<!--- ====Fare Structure======= -->
					<tariffs>
						<Tariff version="1.0" id="myfares:PointToPoint_01">
							<Name>Point to Point   Tariff</Name>
							<OperatorRef version="any" ref="mybus:DTA"/>
							<TypeOfTariffRef version="ntx:v1.0" ref="ntx:point_to_point"/>
							<fareStructureElements>
								<FareStructureElement version="1.0" id="myfares:PointToPoint_01@access">
									<distanceMatrixElements>
										<DistanceMatrixElementRef version="any" ref="myfares:SSP_001+SSP_002"/>
										<DistanceMatrixElementRef version="any" ref="myfares:SSP_001+SSP_077"/>
										<DistanceMatrixElementRef version="any" ref="myfares:SSP_002+SSP_077"/>
									</distanceMatrixElements>
									<GenericParameterAssignment order="1" id="myfares:PointToPoint_01@access" version="1.0">
										<TypeOfAccessRightAssignmentRef version="ntx:v1.0" ref="ntx:can_access"/>
										<ValidityParameterGroupingType>XOR</ValidityParameterGroupingType>
										<validityParameters>
											<GroupOfLinesRef version="any" ref="mybus:my_lines"/>
										</validityParameters>
									</GenericParameterAssignment>
								</FareStructureElement>
								<FareStructureElement version="1.0" id="myfares:PointToPoint_01@eligibility">
									<Name>Eligible user types</Name>
									<GenericParameterAssignment order="1" id="myfares:PointToPoint_01@eligibility" version="1.0">
										<TypeOfAccessRightAssignmentRef version="ntx:v1.0" ref="ntx:eligible"/>
										<LimitationGroupingType>XOR</LimitationGroupingType>
										<limitations>
											<!--- ===ELIGIBILITY USAGE PARAMETERS ========= -->
											<UserProfile version="any" id="myfares:adult">
												<Name>Child Fare</Name>
												<TypeOfConcessionRef version="any" ref="myfares:adult"/>
												<MaximumAge>16</MaximumAge>
											</UserProfile>
											<UserProfile version="any" id="myfares:child">
												<Name>Child Fare</Name>
												<TypeOfConcessionRef version="any" ref="myfares:child"/>
												<MaximumAge>16</MaximumAge>
											</UserProfile>
										</limitations>
									</GenericParameterAssignment>
								</FareStructureElement>
								<FareStructureElement version="1.0" id="myfares:PointToPoint_01@classes_of_use">
									<Name>Available classes of use</Name>
									<GenericParameterAssignment order="1" id="myfares:PointToPoint_01@classes_of_use" version="1.0">
										<TypeOfAccessRightAssignmentRef version="ntx:v1.0" ref="ntx:can_access"/>
										<ValidityParameterGroupingType>XOR</ValidityParameterGroupingType>
										<validityParameters>
											<ClassOfUseRef version="any" ref="myfares:standard"/>
											<ClassOfUseRef version="any" ref="myfares:first"/>
										</validityParameters>
									</GenericParameterAssignment>
								</FareStructureElement>
								<FareStructureElement id="myfares:PointToPoint_01@conditions_of_travel" version="1.0">
									<Name>Conditions of travel</Name>
									<GenericParameterAssignment version="1.0" order="1" id="myfares:PointToPoint_01@conditions_of_travel">
										<TypeOfAccessRightAssignmentRef version="ntx:v1.0" ref="ntx:condition_of_use"/>
										<LimitationGroupingType>AND</LimitationGroupingType>
										<limitations>
											<RoundTrip version="1.0" id="myfares:PointToPoint_01@conditions_of_travel@trip">
												<Name>Single Trip</Name>
												<TripType>single</TripType>
											</RoundTrip>
											<FrequencyOfUse version="1.0" id="myfares:PointToPoint_01@conditions_of_travel@frequency">
												<Name>One trip no transfers</Name>
												<FrequencyOfUseType>single</FrequencyOfUseType>
												<MaximalFrequency>1</MaximalFrequency>
											</FrequencyOfUse>
											<Interchanging version="1.0" id="myfares:PointToPoint_01@conditions_of_travel@interchanging">
												<FromMode>bus</FromMode>
												<ToMode>bus</ToMode>
												<MaximumNumberOfInterchanges>0</MaximumNumberOfInterchanges>
											</Interchanging>
										</limitations>
									</GenericParameterAssignment>
								</FareStructureElement>
							</fareStructureElements>
							<distanceMatrixElements>
								<DistanceMatrixElement version="any" id="myfares:SSP_001+SSP_002">
									<Name>A to B</Name>
									<StartStopPointRef version="any" ref="mybus:SSP_001"/>
									<EndStopPointRef version="any" ref="mybus:SSP_002"/>
									<prices>
										<DistanceMatrixElementPriceRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:PointToPoint_01@p-ticket@SSP_001+SSP_002@standard"/>
										<DistanceMatrixElementPriceRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:PointToPoint_01@p-ticket@SSP_001+SSP_002@first"/>
										<DistanceMatrixElementPriceRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:PointToPoint_01@m-ticket@SSP_001+SSP_002@standard"/>
										<DistanceMatrixElementPriceRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:PointToPoint_01@m-ticket@SSP_001+SSP_002@first"/>
									</prices>
								</DistanceMatrixElement>
								<DistanceMatrixElement version="any" id="myfares:SSP_001+SSP_077">
									<Name>A to C</Name>
									<StartStopPointRef version="any" ref="mybus:SSP_001"/>
									<EndStopPointRef version="any" ref="mybus:SSP_077"/>
									<prices>
										<DistanceMatrixElementPriceRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:PointToPoint_01@p-ticket@SSP_001+SSP_077@standard"/>
										<DistanceMatrixElementPriceRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:PointToPoint_01@p-ticket@SSP_001+SSP_077@first"/>
										<DistanceMatrixElementPriceRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:PointToPoint_01@m-ticket@SSP_001+SSP_077@standard"/>
										<DistanceMatrixElementPriceRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:PointToPoint_01@m-ticket@SSP_001+SSP_077@first"/>
									</prices>
								</DistanceMatrixElement>
								<DistanceMatrixElement version="any" id="myfares:SSP_002+SSP_077">
									<Name>B to C</Name>
									<StartStopPointRef version="any" ref="mybus:SSP_002"/>
									<EndStopPointRef version="any" ref="mybus:SSP_077"/>
									<prices>
										<DistanceMatrixElementPriceRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:PointToPoint_01@p-ticket@SSP_002+SSP_077@standard"/>
										<DistanceMatrixElementPriceRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:PointToPoint_01@p-ticket@SSP_002+SSP_077@first"/>
										<DistanceMatrixElementPriceRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:PointToPoint_01@m-ticket@SSP_002+SSP_077@standard"/>
										<DistanceMatrixElementPriceRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:PointToPoint_01@m-ticket@SSP_002+SSP_077@first"/>
									</prices>
								</DistanceMatrixElement>
							</distanceMatrixElements>
							<!--  == Prices === -->
							<priceGroups>
								<PriceGroupRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:Line24@discounts"/>
							</priceGroups>
							<fareTables>
								<FareTableRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:Line24"/>
							</fareTables>
						</Tariff>
					</tariffs>
					<!--- ====Fare Product======= -->
					<fareProducts>
						<PreassignedFareProduct version="1.0" id="myfares:Trip">
							<Name>Standard Point To Point Trip  fare   </Name>
							<TypeOfFareProductRef version="ntx:v1.0" ref="ntx:trip"/>
							<OperatorRef version="any" ref="mybus:DTA"/>
							<!--- ====VALIDABLE ELEMENTs====== -->
							<validableElements>
								<ValidableElement version="1.0" id="myfares:Trip@travel">
									<Name>Single  ride</Name>
									<fareStructureElements>
										<FareStructureElementRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:PointToPoint_01@access"/>
										<FareStructureElementRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:PointToPoint_01@eligibility"/>
										<FareStructureElementRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:PointToPoint_01@classes_of_use"/>
										<FareStructureElementRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:PointToPoint_01@conditions_of_travel"/>
									</fareStructureElements>
								</ValidableElement>
							</validableElements>
							<!--- ====ACCESS RIGHTs======= -->
							<accessRightsInProduct>
								<AccessRightInProduct version="1.0" id="myfares:Trip" order="1">
									<Name>First ride</Name>
									<IsFirstInSequence>true</IsFirstInSequence>
									<IsLastInSequence>true</IsLastInSequence>
									<ValidableElementRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:Trip@travel"/>
								</AccessRightInProduct>
							</accessRightsInProduct>
						</PreassignedFareProduct>
					</fareProducts>
					<!--==== Sales Packages==== -->
					<salesOfferPackages>
						<SalesOfferPackage version="1.0" id="myfares:Trip-SOP@p-ticket">
							<Name/>
							<distributionAssignments>
								<DistributionAssignment version="10" id="myfares:Trip-SOP@p-ticket@atStop" order="1">
									<Name>Onboard</Name>
									<Description>Pay for ticket onboard</Description>
									<DistributionChannelType>atStop</DistributionChannelType>
									<TicketingServiceFacilityList>purchase</TicketingServiceFacilityList>
									<PaymentMethods>cashAndCard</PaymentMethods>
									<FulfilmentMethodRef ref="ntx:collect_on_board" versionRef="ntx:v1.0"/>
								</DistributionAssignment>
								<DistributionAssignment version="1.0" id="myfares:Trip-SOP@p-ticket@onBoard" order="2">
									<Name>Onboard</Name>
									<Description>Pay for ticket onboard</Description>
									<DistributionChannelType>onBoard</DistributionChannelType>
									<TicketingServiceFacilityList>purchase</TicketingServiceFacilityList>
									<PaymentMethods>cashAndCard</PaymentMethods>
									<FulfilmentMethodRef ref="ntx:collect_on_board" versionRef="ntx:v1.0"/>
								</DistributionAssignment>
							</distributionAssignments>
							<salesOfferPackageElements>
								<SalesOfferPackageElement version="1.0" id="myfares:Trip-SOP@p-ticket" order="1">
									<TypeOfTravelDocumentRef version="any" ref="myfares:printed_ticket"/>
									<PreassignedFareProductRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:Trip"/>
								</SalesOfferPackageElement>
							</salesOfferPackageElements>
						</SalesOfferPackage>
						<SalesOfferPackage version="1.0" id="myfares:Trip-SOP@m-ticket">
							<Name/>
							<distributionAssignments>
								<DistributionAssignment version="10" id="myfares:Trip-SOP@m-ticket@online" order="1">
									<Name>Online</Name>
									<DistributionChannelType>mobileDevice</DistributionChannelType>
									<PaymentMethods>cardsOnly</PaymentMethods>
									<FulfilmentMethodRef ref="ntx:mobile_app" versionRef="ntx:v1.0"/>
								</DistributionAssignment>
							</distributionAssignments>
							<salesOfferPackageElements>
								<SalesOfferPackageElement version="1.0" id="myfares:Trip-SOP@m-ticket" order="1">
									<TypeOfTravelDocumentRef version="any" ref="myfares:mobile_app"/>
									<PreassignedFareProductRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:Trip"/>
								</SalesOfferPackageElement>
							</salesOfferPackageElements>
						</SalesOfferPackage>
					</salesOfferPackages>
				</FareFrame>
				<!--- =============== FAREs =========== -->
				<FarePriceFrame version="1.0" id="myfares:DTA@Line24@prices">
					<Name>Prices for Line 24</Name>
					<prerequisites>
						<FareFrameRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:DTA@Line24@products"/>
					</prerequisites>
					<!--- ====Pricing Parmaters======= -->
					<PricingParameterSet version="1.0" id="myfares:Line24">

							<DiscountingRule version="1.0" id="myfares:0%">

							</DiscountingRule>
							<DiscountingRule version="1.0" id="myfares:50%">
								<DiscountAsPercentage>50</DiscountAsPercentage>
							</DiscountingRule>
						</pricingRules>
					</PricingParameterSet>
					<priceGroups>
						<PriceGroup version="1.0" id="myfares:Line24@discounts">
							<members>
								<UsageParameterPrice version="1.0" id="myfares:adult">
									<Name>Adult price</Name>
									<DiscountingRuleRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:0%"/>
									<UserProfileRef version="any" ref="myfares:adult"/>
								</UsageParameterPrice>
								<UsageParameterPrice version="1.0" id="myfares:child">
									<Name>Child discount - all fares</Name>
									<DiscountingRuleRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:50%"/>
									<UserProfileRef version="any" ref="myfares:child"/>
								</UsageParameterPrice>
							</members>
						</PriceGroup>
					</priceGroups>
					<!--- ====Fare Prices======= -->
					<fareTables>
						<FareTable version="1.0" id="myfares:Line24">
							<Name>Prices for Point to Point  Trip Product</Name>
							<pricesFor>
								<PreassignedFareProductRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:Trip"/>
							</pricesFor>
							<usedIn>
								<TariffRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:PointToPoint_01"/>
							</usedIn>
							<limitations>
								<UserProfileRef version="any" ref="myfares:adult"/>
							</limitations>
							<includes>
								<FareTable version="1.0" id="myfares:Line24@p-ticket">
									<Name>Prices for Point to Point  Trip Product - paper ticket</Name>
									<pricesFor>
										<SalesOfferPackageRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:Trip-SOP@p-ticket"/>
									</pricesFor>
									<includes>
										<FareTable version="1.0" id="myfares:PointToPoint_01@p-ticket@standard">
											<Name>Prices for Point to Point Trip Product  - Standard</Name>
											<specifics>
												<ClassOfUseRef version="any" ref="myfares:standard"/>
											</specifics>
											<cells>
												<DistanceMatrixElementPrice version="1.0" id="myfares:PointToPoint_01@p-ticket@SSP_001+SSP_002@standard">
													<Name>Alpha to Beta - Price</Name>
													<Amount>1.00</Amount>
													<DistanceMatrixElementRef version="any" ref="myfares:SSP_001+SSP_002"/>
												</DistanceMatrixElementPrice>
												<DistanceMatrixElementPrice version="1.0" id="myfares:PointToPoint_01@p-ticket@SSP_001+SSP_077@standard">
													<Name>Alpha  to Charley - Price</Name>
													<Amount>3.00</Amount>
													<DistanceMatrixElementRef version="any" ref="myfares:SSP_001+SSP_077"/>
												</DistanceMatrixElementPrice>
												<DistanceMatrixElementPrice version="1.0" id="myfares:PointToPoint_01@p-ticket@SSP_002+SSP_077@standard">
													<Name>Beta  to Charley - Price</Name>
													<Amount>2.00</Amount>
													<DistanceMatrixElementRef version="any" ref="myfares:SSP_002+SSP_077"/>
												</DistanceMatrixElementPrice>
											</cells>
										</FareTable>
										<FareTable version="any" id="myfares:PointToPoint_01@p-ticket@first">
											<Name>Prices for  Point to Point Fare Product  - First Class</Name>
											<specifics>
												<ClassOfUseRef version="any" ref="myfares:first"/>
											</specifics>
											<cells>
												<DistanceMatrixElementPrice version="1.0" id="myfares:PointToPoint_01@p-ticket@SSP_001+SSP_002@first">
													<Name>Alpha to Beta - Price</Name>
													<Amount>1.50</Amount>
													<DistanceMatrixElementRef version="any" ref="myfares:SSP_001+SSP_002"/>
												</DistanceMatrixElementPrice>
												<DistanceMatrixElementPrice version="1.0" id="myfares:PointToPoint_01@p-ticket@SSP_001+SSP_077@first">
													<Name>Alpha  to Charley - Price</Name>
													<Amount>5.00</Amount>
													<DistanceMatrixElementRef version="any" ref="myfares:SSP_001+SSP_077"/>
												</DistanceMatrixElementPrice>
												<DistanceMatrixElementPrice version="1.0" id="myfares:PointToPoint_01@p-ticket@SSP_002+SSP_077@first">
													<Name>Beta  to Charley - Price</Name>
													<Amount>3.00</Amount>
													<DistanceMatrixElementRef version="any" ref="myfares:SSP_002+SSP_077"/>
												</DistanceMatrixElementPrice>
											</cells>
										</FareTable>
									</includes>
								</FareTable>
								<FareTable version="1.0" id="myfares:Line24@m-ticket">
									<Name>Prices for Point to Point  Trip Product - Mobile app</Name>
									<pricesFor>
										<SalesOfferPackageRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:Trip-SOP@m-ticket"/>
									</pricesFor>
									<includes>
										<FareTable version="1.0" id="myfares:PointToPoint_01@m-ticket@standard">
											<Name>Prices for Point to Point Trip Product  - Mobile app - Standard</Name>
											<specifics>
												<ClassOfUseRef version="any" ref="myfares:standard"/>
											</specifics>
											<cells>
												<DistanceMatrixElementPrice version="1.0" id="myfares:PointToPoint_01@m-ticket@SSP_001+SSP_002@standard">
													<Name>Alpha to Beta - Price</Name>
													<Amount>0.90</Amount>
													<DistanceMatrixElementRef version="any" ref="myfares:SSP_001+SSP_002"/>
												</DistanceMatrixElementPrice>
												<DistanceMatrixElementPrice version="1.0" id="myfares:PointToPoint_01@m-ticket@SSP_001+SSP_077@standard">
													<Name>Alpha  to Charley - Price</Name>
													<Amount>2.70</Amount>
													<DistanceMatrixElementRef version="any" ref="myfares:SSP_001+SSP_077"/>
												</DistanceMatrixElementPrice>
												<DistanceMatrixElementPrice version="1.0" id="myfares:PointToPoint_01@m-ticket@SSP_002+SSP_077@standard">
													<Name>Beta  to Charley - Price</Name>
													<Amount>1.90</Amount>
													<DistanceMatrixElementRef version="any" ref="myfares:SSP_002+SSP_077"/>
												</DistanceMatrixElementPrice>
											</cells>
										</FareTable>
										<FareTable version="any" id="myfares:PointToPoint_01@m-ticket@first">
											<Name>Prices for  Point to Point Fare Product  - Mobile app - First Class</Name>
											<specifics>
												<ClassOfUseRef version="any" ref="myfares:first"/>
											</specifics>
											<cells>
												<DistanceMatrixElementPrice version="1.0" id="myfares:PointToPoint_01@m-ticket@SSP_001+SSP_002@first">
													<Name>Alpha to Beta - Price</Name>
													<Amount>1.40</Amount>
													<DistanceMatrixElementRef version="any" ref="myfares:SSP_001+SSP_002"/>
												</DistanceMatrixElementPrice>
												<DistanceMatrixElementPrice version="1.0" id="myfares:PointToPoint_01@m-ticket@SSP_001+SSP_077@first">
													<Name>Alpha  to Charley - Price</Name>
													<Amount>4.80</Amount>
													<DistanceMatrixElementRef version="any" ref="myfares:SSP_001+SSP_077"/>
												</DistanceMatrixElementPrice>
												<DistanceMatrixElementPrice version="1.0" id="myfares:PointToPoint_01@m-ticket@SSP_002+SSP_077@first">
													<Name>Beta  to Charley - Price</Name>

												</DistanceMatrixElementPrice>
											</cells>
										</FareTable>
									</includes>
								</FareTable>
							</includes>
						</FareTable>
					</fareTables>
				</FarePriceFrame>
				<!--   ==== COMMON RESOURCES  ==   -->
				<ResourceFrame version="1.0" id="mybus:DTA@Common_resources">

						<Codespace id="ntx">

						</Codespace>

					<typesOfValue>
						<ValueSet version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:Types_of_Tariff" classOfValues="TypeOfTariff">
							<Name>Types of Tariff</Name>
							<values>

								<TypeOfTariff version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:Distance_kilometers">
									<Name>Kilometer Distance Kilometers</Name>

label: Bus SimpleFares ZoneToZone AdultChildProduct
xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!-- ==== Simple Zone to Zone Fare  Example ====== 
This example shows the encoding of a Zone to zone tariff for a simple busn etwork in  NeTex XML  

Uses Zone To Zone fares.  There is a discount for children 16 or under
  
Data is Fictional 

(C) CEN & Crown Copyright 2018, 2019 
Free to use under a Creative Commons license.

v1.1 Revised & corrected to use Tariff and simpler ids

===================================================
   
1. OVERVIEW
============
There are five stops
   The first route has just  three stops       	  A - B  - C    
		The second route 	has stops						B	- Q  - R
	
	
	TARIFF ZONE 1 has SCHEDULED STOP POINT : A
	TARIFF ZONE 2 has SCHEDULED STOP POINTss: B, C
	TARIFF ZONE 3 has SCHEDULED STOP POINTs: Q,  R

From To	Adult Price    
						Zone	1		Zone	2				Zone	3
    Zone	1  		 0.50 EUR		1.00 EUR	 	3.00 EUR		 
    Zone	2	 			-				0.50 EUR		2.00 EUR	
	Zone	3				 -				-					0.75 EUR	
	
 
Point to point  Fare matrix
From To	Adult Price   Child price
    1  1		0.50 EUR		50%
    1  2		1.00 EUR		50%
    1  3		3.00 EUR		50%
    2  2		0.50 EUR		50%
	2  3		2.00 EUR		50%
    3 32		0.75 EUR		50%

==================================
2. DETAILS
 
SCHEDULED STOP POINTs
	    A)   mybus:ssp_001  Alpha 
		B)  mybus:ssp_002   Bravo 
		C)  mybus:ssp_077	 Charley 

		Q)  mybus:ssp_021	 Quebec 
		R)  mybus:ssp_022	 Romeo
 
TARIFF ZONEs
	TARIFF ZONE 1 has SCHEDULED STOP POINT : A
	TARIFF ZONE 2 has SCHEDULED STOP POINTss: B, C
	TARIFF ZONE 3 has SCHEDULED STOP POINTs: Q,  R



TARIFF with FARE STRUCTURE ELEMENTS for 
    Access FARE STRUCTURE ELEMENTmyfares:Tz2z@access
        DISTANCE MATRIX ELEMENTs
	1 1   DISTANCE MATRIX ELEMENT myfares:Z1+Z1
	1 2   DISTANCE MATRIX ELEMENT myfares:Z1+Z2
    1 3   DISTANCE MATRIX ELEMENT myfares:Z1+Z3
    2 2   DISTANCE MATRIX ELEMENT myfares:Z2+Z2
    2 3   DISTANCE MATRIX ELEMENT myfares:Z2+Z3
    3 3   DISTANCE MATRIX ELEMENT myfares:Z3+Z3

    Eligibility  FARE STRUCTURE ELEMENT myfares:Tz2z@Eligibility
		USER PROFLE - Adults 17 or over 
		USER PROFLE - Child  16 or under  , discounted  

	Conditions of Use ARE STRUCTURE ELEMENT myfares:Tz2z@conditions_pf_travel
   		FREQUENCY OF USE   one trip unlimited   myfares:FrequencyOfUse:oneTrip
     		ROUND TRIP OF USE  single
    
FARE PRODUCT:s

	 PREASSIGNED FARE PRODUCT myfares:SingleTrip
		
           With VALIDABLE  ELEMENT  that references

SALES OFFER PACKAGEa   

        SALES OFFER PACKAGE  myfares:SingleTrip-SOP@p-yickey  that references the fare product
 
PRICE GROUP  used to group sets of prices

			USAGE PARAMETER PRICE	myfares:adult    100%
			USAGE PARAMETER PRICE	myfares:adult 	50%

			DISTANCE MATRIX ELEMENT PRICE myfares:Tz2z@Z1+Z1 : 0.50 EUR
			DISTANCE MATRIX ELEMENT PRICE myfares:Tz2z@Z1+Z2 : 1.00 EUR
			DISTANCE MATRIX ELEMENT PRICE myfares:Tz2z@Z1+Z3 : 3.00 EUR
			DISTANCE MATRIX ELEMENT PRICE myfares:Tz2z@Z2+Z2 : 0.50 EUR
			DISTANCE MATRIX ELEMENT PRICE myfares:Tz2z@Z2+Z3 : 2.00 EUR
			DISTANCE MATRIX ELEMENT PRICE myfares:Tz2z@Z3+Z3 : 0.75 EUR


A COMPOSITE FRAME is used to group the component FRAMEs
 
   - It has a VALIDITY CONDITION   and sets the codespaces etc

		A SERVICE  FRAME is used to contain the STOP POINT  elements   LINE, etc
		A FARE  FRAME is used to contain  the FARE  product description   elements 
		A FARE  FRAME is used to contain  the FARE     prices 
		A RESOURCE  FRAME is used to contain  the common code values

-->

				<!--- =============== FAREs =========== -->
				<FareFrame version="1.0" id="myfares:DTA@z2Z@prices">

					<PricingParameterSet version="1.0" id="myfares:DTA@rules">

							<DiscountingRule version="1.0" id="myfares:0%">

							</DiscountingRule>
							<DiscountingRule version="1.0" id="myfares:50%">
								<DiscountAsPercentage>50</DiscountAsPercentage>
							</DiscountingRule>
						</pricingRules>
					</PricingParameterSet>
					<priceGroups>
						<PriceGroup version="1.0" id="myfares:DTA@discounts">
							<members>
								<UsageParameterPrice version="1.0" id="myfares:adult">
									<Name>Adult price</Name>

								</UsageParameterPrice>
								<UsageParameterPrice version="1.0" id="myfares:child">
									<Name>Child discount - all fares</Name>
									<DiscountingRuleRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:50%"/>
									<UserProfileRef version="any" ref="myfares:child"/>
								</UsageParameterPrice>
							</members>
						</PriceGroup>
					</priceGroups>
					<!--- ====Fare Prices======= -->
					<fareTables>
						<FareTable version="1.0" id="myfares:DTA">
							<Name>Prices for Zonal Trip Product  </Name>
							<pricesFor>
								<SalesOfferPackageRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:SingleTrip-SOP@p-ticket"/>
								<PreassignedFareProductRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:SingleTrip"/>
							</pricesFor>
							<usedIn>
								<TariffRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:Tz2z"/>
							</usedIn>
							<cells>
								<DistanceMatrixElementPrice version="1.0" id="myfares:Tz2z@Z1+Z1">
									<Name>Zone 1  to  Zone 1</Name>
									<Amount>0.50</Amount>
									<DistanceMatrixElementRef version="any" ref="myfares:Z1+Z2"/>
								</DistanceMatrixElementPrice>
								<DistanceMatrixElementPrice version="1.0" id="myfares:Tz2z@Z1+Z2">
									<Name>Zone 1  to  Zone 2</Name>
									<Amount>1.00</Amount>
									<DistanceMatrixElementRef version="any" ref="myfares:Z1+Z2"/>
								</DistanceMatrixElementPrice>
								<DistanceMatrixElementPrice version="1.0" id="myfares:Tz2z@Z1+Z3">
									<Name>Zone 1  to  Zone 3</Name>
									<Amount>3.00</Amount>
									<DistanceMatrixElementRef version="any" ref="myfares:Z1+Z3"/>
								</DistanceMatrixElementPrice>
								<DistanceMatrixElementPrice version="1.0" id="myfares:Tz2z@Z2+Z2">
									<Name>Zone 2  to  Zone 3</Name>
									<Amount>0.50</Amount>
									<DistanceMatrixElementRef version="any" ref="myfares:Z2+Z2"/>
								</DistanceMatrixElementPrice>
								<DistanceMatrixElementPrice version="1.0" id="myfares:Tz2z@Z2+Z3">
									<Name>Zone 2  to  Zone 3</Name>

									<Name>Zone 2  to  Zone 3</Name>

				<!--- ====RESOURCES==== -->

label: Bus SimpleFares ZoneToZone OffPeakProduct

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!-- ==== Simple Zone to Zone with peak and Off peak  ratesFare Example ====== 
This example shows the encoding of tariff for a simple bus network witha one to zone stucture  and peak and off peak fares in NeTex XML 
 
It is similar to the simple zonal example except that there are separate 
FARE PRODUCTS for Peak and Off Peak times 

The Prices are held separately in a PRICE GROUP to make it easy to change them 
 
Data is Fictional 

(C) CEN & Crown Copyright 2018, 2019 
Free to use under a Creative Commons license.

v1.1 Add Price refs, revise time_bands corrections

===================================================
 
1. OVERVIEW
============
OPERATOR mybus:Dta  operates  the mybus:DTA NETWORK,  with lines LINE   mybus:Line_24 -  & Line_24_48

		 The first route has just three stops 	 A - B - C 
																		::
	 	The second route 	has stops							B	- Q - R
		
	TARIFF ZONE 1 has SCHEDULED STOP POINT : A
	TARIFF ZONE 2 has SCHEDULED STOP POINTss: B, C , Q 
	TARIFF ZONE 3 has SCHEDULED STOP POINTs: Q, R

Stop Q is in two zones : 2 and 3.


There are separate peak and off peak  prices.
      Peak is Working Weekdays 08:30  to 10:00  am  and 17:00 to 18:30 pm  (holidays excluded)
      Offpeak is other times

There is one  ZoneToZone FARE PRODUCT, covering : 

	Adult Standard Fare
	Child Standard fare
	Adult Peak Fare
	Child Peak fare

Adult prices are
	From To	Adult Price 
						Zone	1		Zone	2				Zone	3
 Zone	1 		 0.50 EUR		1.00 EUR	 	3.00 EUR		 
 Zone	2	 			-				0.50 EUR		2.00 EUR	
	Zone	3				 -				-					0.75 EUR	
	
The prices are thus 
Zone to Zone Fare matrix
				Adult Price 						Child price
From To	OffPeak 		Peak 	
 1 1		0.50 EUR		1.00 EUR		50% 		 
 1 2		1.00 EUR		2.00 EUR		50% 
 1 3		3.00 EUR		4.00 EUR 		50%
 2 2		0.50 EUR		1.00 EUR.		50%
 2 3		2.00 EUR		2.50 EUR.		50%
3 3		0.75 EUR		1.00 EUR.		50%

	TARIFF ZONE 3 has SCHEDULED STOP POINTs: Q,  R
 

TARIFF with FARE STRUCTURE ELEMENTS for 
   (i)  Access FARE STRUCTURE ELEMENTmyfares:Tz2z@access
        DISTANCE MATRIX ELEMENTs
	1 1   DISTANCE MATRIX ELEMENT myfares:Z1+Z1
	1 2   DISTANCE MATRIX ELEMENT myfares:Z1+Z2
    1 3   DISTANCE MATRIX ELEMENT myfares:Z1+Z3
    2 2   DISTANCE MATRIX ELEMENT myfares:Z2+Z2
    2 3   DISTANCE MATRIX ELEMENT myfares:Z2+Z3
    3 3   DISTANCE MATRIX ELEMENT myfares:Z3+Z3

   (ii) Eligibility  FARE STRUCTURE ELEMENT myfares:Tz2z@Eligibility
		USER PROFLE - Adults 17 or over 
		USER PROFLE - Child  16 or under  , discounted  

   (iii) demand type  FARE STRUCTURE ELEMENT myfares:Tz2z@deman_type
		FARE DEMAND TYPE  - myfares:TF01@demand_types@peak
			FARE DEMAND TYPE  - myfares:TF01@demand_types@opp_peak

	(iv) Conditions of Use ARE STRUCTURE ELEMENT myfares:Tz2z@conditions_pf_travel
   		FREQUENCY OF USE   one trip unlimited   myfares:FrequencyOfUse:oneTrip
     		ROUND TRIP OF USE  single
    
FARE PRODUCT:s

	 PREASSIGNED FARE PRODUCT myfares:SingleTrip
		
           With VALIDABLE  ELEMENT  that references the FARE STRUCTUR ELEMENts

SALES OFFER PACKAGEa   

          SALES OFFER PACKAGE  myfares:SingleTrip-SOP@p-ticket  that references the fare product


FARE TABLE  used to group sets of prices 

Two nested FARE TABLES are used to group sets of prices
	OffPeak FARE TABLE myfares:FareTable:offPeak
			USAGE PARAMETER PRICE	myfares:Tz2z@adult 100%
			USAGE PARAMETER PRICE	myfares:Tz2z@adult 	50%

			DISTANCE MATRIX ELEMENT PRICE myfares:Z1+Z1@offPeak : 0.50 EUR
			DISTANCE MATRIX ELEMENT PRICE myfares:Z1+Z2@offPeak : 1,00 EUR
			DISTANCE MATRIX ELEMENT PRICE myfares:Z1+Z3@offPeak : 3.00 EUR
			DISTANCE MATRIX ELEMENT PRICE myfares:Z2+Z2@offPeak : 0.50 EUR
			DISTANCE MATRIX ELEMENT PRICE myfares:Z2+Z3@offPeak : 2.00 EUR
			DISTANCE MATRIX ELEMENT PRICE myfares:Z3+Z3@offPeak : 0.75 EUR

	Peak FARE TABLE  myfares:FareTable:Peak 
			DISTANCE MATRIX ELEMENT PRICE myfares:Z1+Z1_adult@peak : 1,00 EUR
			DISTANCE MATRIX ELEMENT PRICE myfares:Z1+Z2_adult@peak : 2.00 EUR
			DISTANCE MATRIX ELEMENT PRICE myfares:Z1+Z3_adult@peak : 3.00 EUR
			DISTANCE MATRIX ELEMENT PRICE myfares:Z2+Z2_adult@peak : 1,00 EUR
			DISTANCE MATRIX ELEMENT PRICE myfares:Z2+Z3_adult@peak : 2.50 EUR
			DISTANCE MATRIX ELEMENT PRICE myfares:Z3+Z3_adult@peak : 1,00 EUR


A COMPOSITE FRAME is used to group the component FRAMEs
 
   - It has a VALIDITY CONDITION   and sets the codespaces etc

		A SERVICE  FRAME is used to contain the STOP POINT  elements   LINE, etc
		A FARE  FRAME is used to contain  the FARE  product description   elements 
		A FARE  FRAME is used to contain  the FARE     prices 
		A SERVICE CALENDAR FRAME is used to contain  the temporla conditions that define peak/off peak
		A RESOURCE  FRAME is used to contain  the common code values

					<!--- ====Fare Product======= -->
					<fareProducts>
						<PreassignedFareProduct version="1.0" id="myfares:SingleTrip">
							<Name>Adult Standard Zone to zone - Peak</Name>
							<TypeOfFareProductRef version="ntx:v1.0" ref="ntx:trip"/>
							<OperatorRef version="any" ref="mybus:DTA"/>
							<!--- ====VALIDABLE ELEMENTs====== -->
							<validableElements>
								<ValidableElement version="1.0" id="myfares:SingleTrip@travel">
									<Name>Single ride</Name>
									<fareStructureElements>
										<FareStructureElementRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:Tz2z@access"/>
										<FareStructureElementRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:Tz2z@eligibility"/>

					<!--==== Sales Packages==== -->

								<DistributionAssignment version="1.0" id="myfares:SingleTrip-SOP@p-ticket@onBoard" order="2">
									<Name>Onboard</Name>
									<Description>Pay for ticket onboard</Description>
									<DistributionChannelRef versionRef="ntx:v1.0" ref="ntx:on_board"/>
									<DistributionChannelType>onBoard</DistributionChannelType>
									<TicketingServiceFacilityList>purchase</TicketingServiceFacilityList>

									<FulfilmentMethodRef ref="ntx:collect_on_board" versionRef="ntx:v1.0"/>

							<salesOfferPackageElements>

								</SalesOfferPackageElement>
							</salesOfferPackageElements>
						</SalesOfferPackage>
					</salesOfferPackages>
				</FareFrame>
				<FarePriceFrame version="1.0" id="myfares:DTA@z2z_time_banded@prices">
					<prerequisites>
						<FareFrameRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:DTA@z2z_time_banded@products"/>
					</prerequisites>
					<!--- ====Fare Prices======= -->
					<fareTables>

											<Name>Zone 3 to Zone 3 Peak</Name>

										</DistanceMatrixElementPrice>

				</FarePriceFrame>
				<!-- Service Calendar Nov 2010 COMPACT Coding === -->

					<Name>Service Calendar Coding</Name>

		<!--- ====RESOURCES==== -->

label: Bus GeographicFares UnitDistance SingleProduct
xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!-- ==== Simple Unit Distance Fare Example ====== 
This example shows the encoding of a unit distance fare set for a simple bus timetable for a linear route in NeTex XML 
 
Uses a fare based on the number of units between each point. There is a single FARE PRODUCT 

It is based on the same route used in other bus examples e.g. 
		Bus_SimpleTimetable_WithTimings example to see LINKS & PATTERNs
 
It is  extended in other examples with further details
		Bus_SimpleTimetable_PointToPoint_MultipleProducts to see added Fare Products 
		Bus_SimpleTimetable_ZoneToZone_AdultChildProducts to see Zonal Products 
		Bus_SimpleTimetable_ZoneToZone_OffPeakProduct to see added Zonal Products 

Data is Fictional 

(C) CEN & Crown Copyright 2018, 2019 
Free to use under a Creative Commons license.

v1.1 Revised & corrected to use Tariff and simpler ids

===================================================
1. OVERVIEW
============

 Line24 has just four stops   A- (1) - B - (2) - C - (1) - D

Fare Prices are defined in terms of number of units between stops 

Point to point Fare matrix

	AB = gi1 1 unit	 
 BC = gi2 2 unit	 
 CD = gi1 1 unit	 

   A					B 		C 		 D
 D gi1			gi1+g12 	gi1 	 -
 C gi1+g2		gi2 			-
 B gi1	-
 A - 
 
Price Per Unit £1,50

Thus standard fares woudl be calculated as 

   A		B 	C 	 D
 D 1.50	5.50 	1.50 	 -
 C 5.50	3.00 	-
 B 1.50	-
 A - 

==================================
2. DETAILS

There is one Line : LINE 24  for operator mybus@DTA

SCHEDULED STOP POINTs
	 A) mybus:ssp_001 Alpha						 
		B) mybus:ssp_002 Bravo							 
		C) mybus:ssp_077	 Charley
		D) mybus:ssp_078	 Delta 

TARIFF with 

 (a)  are Two GEOGRAPHIC INTERVALs 
	1 Step: GEOGRAPHICAL INTERVAL: myfares:Unit_Distance@gi_1 
	2 Steps: GEOGRAPHICAL INTERVAL: myfares:Unit_Distance@gi_2 


(b) FARE STRUCTURE ELEMENTs for 

	 (i) Access FARE STRUCTURE ELEMENT myfares:Unit_Distance@access

	 (ii) Eligibility FARE STRUCTURE ELEMENT myfares:Unit_Distance@Eligibility
		USER PROFLE - Adults 17 or over 
		USER PROFLE - Child 16 or under , discounted 

	(iii) Conditions of Travel ARE STRUCTURE ELEMENT myfares:Unit_Distance@conditions_of_travel
 		FREQUENCY OF USE one trip unlimited myfares:FrequencyOfUse:oneTrip
  		ROUND TRIP OF USE single
 

 (c) DISTANCE MATRIX ELEMENTs

				There are DISTANCE MATRIX ELEMENTs for point to point transition, each references a GEOGRAPHICAL INTERVAL
	AB DISTANCE MATRIX ELEMENT: myfares:SSP_001+SSP_002
			GEOGRAPHICAL INTERVAL: myfares:Unit_Distance@gi_1
 
	BC DISTANCE MATRIX ELEMENT: myfares:SSP_002+SSP_077
			GEOGRAPHICAL INTERVAL: myfares:Unit_Distance@gi_2

 	CD DISTANCE MATRIX ELEMENT: myfares:SSP_077+SSP_078 
			GEOGRAPHICAL INTERVAL: myfares:Unit_Distance@gi_1

FARE PRODUCTs

	 PREASSIGNED FARE PRODUCT myfares:SingleTrip
		
   With VALIDABLE ELEMENT that references the FARE STRUCTUR ELEMENTs

SALES OFFER PACKAGEs 

   SALES OFFER PACKAGE myfares:SingleTrip-SOP@p-ticket that references the FARE PRODUCT
 
PRICE GROUP

 (a)  are Two GEOGRAPHIC INTERVAL PRICEs, 
	1 Step: GEOGRAPHICAL INTERVAL: myfares:Unit_Distance@gi_1
		GEOGRAPHICAL INTERVALPRICE: myfares:gip_1 1 Units 1.00 EUR
	2 Steps: GEOGRAPHICAL INTERVAL: myfares:Unit_Distance@gi_2
		GEOGRAPHICAL INTERVALPRICE: myfares:gip_2 2 Units  3,0 EUR 

A COMPOSITE FRAME is used to group the component FRAMEs
 
 - It has a VALIDITY CONDITION and sets the codespaces etc

		A SERVICE FRAME is used to contain the STOP POINT elements LINE, etc
		A FARE FRAME is used to contain the FARE product description elements 
		A separate FARE FRAME is used to contain the FARE  prices 
		A RESOURCE FRAME is used to contain the common code values 
-->
<PublicationDelivery xmlns="http://www.netex.org.uk/netex" xmlns:siri="http://www.siri.org.uk/siri" xmlns:gml="http://www.opengis.net/gml/3.2" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" version="1.0" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.netex.org.uk/netex ../../../xsd/NeTEx_publication.xsd">
	<PublicationTimestamp>2010-12-17T09:30:47.0Z</PublicationTimestamp>
	<ParticipantRef>SYS001</ParticipantRef>
	<!--- ======WHAT WAS REQUESTED ========== -->
	<PublicationRequest version="1.0">
		<RequestTimestamp>2010-12-17T09:30:47.0Z</RequestTimestamp>
		<ParticipantRef>SYS002</ParticipantRef>
		<topics>
			<NetworkFrameTopic>
				<selectionValidityConditions>
					<AvailabilityCondition version="any" id="hde:range2">
						<FromDate>2011-01-01T00:00:00Z</FromDate>
					</AvailabilityCondition>
				</selectionValidityConditions>
				<FareFrameRef ref="myfares:any">REQUEST</FareFrameRef>
			</NetworkFrameTopic>
		</topics>
	</PublicationRequest>
	<PublicationRefreshInterval>P1M</PublicationRefreshInterval>
	<Description>Example of simple point to point fares</Description>
	<!--- =============== RESULTS =========== -->
	<dataObjects>
		<CompositeFrame version="1.0" id="myfares:DTA@Line24_Unit_Distance">
			<validityConditions>
				<ValidBetween>
					<FromDate>2011-01-01T00:00:00Z</FromDate>
					<ToDate>2011-07-01T00:00:00Z</ToDate>
				</ValidBetween>
			</validityConditions>
			<!--- ======= CODESPACEs======== -->
			<codespaces>
				<Codespace id="mybus">
					<Xmlns>mybus</Xmlns>
					<XmlnsUrl>http://www.mybuses.eu/stuff</XmlnsUrl>
					<Description>My buses</Description>
				</Codespace>
				<Codespace id="myfares">
					<Xmlns>myfares</Xmlns>
					<XmlnsUrl>http://www.myfares,com/fares</XmlnsUrl>
					<Description>Fare data</Description>
				</Codespace>
			</codespaces>
			<!--- =======FRAME DEFAULTS======== -->
			<FrameDefaults>
				<DefaultCodespaceRef ref="myfares"/>
			</FrameDefaults>
			<frames>
				<ServiceFrame version="1.0" id="mybus:DTA@Line24_Unit_Distance@network">
					<Name>Stops for Fare network </Name>
					<prerequisites>
						<ResourceFrameRef version="1.0" ref="mybus:DTA@Common_Resources"/>
					</prerequisites>
					<Network version="any" id="mybus:DTA">
						<members>
							<LineRef version="any" ref="mybus:Line_24"/>
						</members>
						<OperatorRef version="any" ref="mybus:DTA"/>
					</Network>
					<!--- =========LINEs=========== -->
					<lines>
						<Line version="any" id="mybus:Line_24">
							<Name>Line  24</Name>
						</Line>
					</lines>
					<!--- =========STOP POINTs============ -->
					<scheduledStopPoints>
						<ScheduledStopPoint version="any" id="mybus:SSP_001">
							<Name>Alpha & Castle</Name>
							<Location>
								<Longitude>53.0000</Longitude>
								<Latitude>0.1000</Latitude>
							</Location>
							<TimingPointStatus>timingPoint</TimingPointStatus>
							<ShortName>Alpha</ShortName>
							<PublicCode>ALPH</PublicCode>
							<StopType>onstreetBus</StopType>
							<VehicleModes>bus</VehicleModes>
						</ScheduledStopPoint>
						<ScheduledStopPoint version="any" id="mybus:SSP_002">
							<Name>Bravo Street</Name>
							<Location>
								<Longitude>53.2000</Longitude>
								<Latitude>0.2000</Latitude>
							</Location>
							<TimingPointStatus>timingPoint</TimingPointStatus>
							<ShortName>Bravo</ShortName>
							<PublicCode>BRAV</PublicCode>
							<StopType>onstreetBus</StopType>
							<VehicleModes>bus</VehicleModes>
						</ScheduledStopPoint>
						<ScheduledStopPoint version="any" id="mybus:SSP_077">
							<Name>Charley Crescent</Name>
							<Location>
								<Longitude>53.3000</Longitude>
								<Latitude>0.3000</Latitude>
							</Location>
							<TimingPointStatus>timingPoint</TimingPointStatus>
							<ShortName>Charley</ShortName>
							<PublicCode>CHAS</PublicCode>
							<StopType>onstreetBus</StopType>
							<VehicleModes>bus</VehicleModes>
						</ScheduledStopPoint>
						<ScheduledStopPoint version="any" id="mybus:SSP_078">
							<Name>Delta </Name>
							<Location>
								<Longitude>53.3000</Longitude>
								<Latitude>0.3000</Latitude>
							</Location>
							<TimingPointStatus>timingPoint</TimingPointStatus>
							<ShortName>Delta</ShortName>
							<PublicCode>DELTA</PublicCode>
							<StopType>onstreetBus</StopType>
							<VehicleModes>bus</VehicleModes>
						</ScheduledStopPoint>
					</scheduledStopPoints>
				</ServiceFrame>
				<!--- =============== FAREs =========== -->
				<FareFrame version="1.0" id="myfares:DTA@Line24_Unit_Distance@products">
					<prerequisites>
						<ServiceFrameRef version="1.0" ref="mybus:DTA@Line24_Unit_Distance@network"/>
					</prerequisites>
					<!--- ====Fare Structure======= -->
					<geographicalUnits>
						<!--- ====GeographicalU nit======== -->
						<GeographicalUnit version="1.0" id="myfares:1click">
							<Name>Arbitrary Quantized Unit of Transport Usage</Name>
						</GeographicalUnit>
					</geographicalUnits>
					<tariffs>
						<Tariff version="1.0" id="myfares:Unit_Distance">
							<Name>Unit distance fare</Name>
							<OperatorRef version="any" ref="mybus:DTA"/>
							<TypeOfTariffRef version="ntx:v1.0" ref="ntx:unit_distance"/>
							<GeographicalUnitRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:1click"/>
							<geographicalIntervals>
								<GeographicalInterval version="1.0" id="myfares:Unit_Distance@gi_1">
									<Name>One Click</Name>
									<StartGeographicalValue>1</StartGeographicalValue>
									<EndGeographicalValue>2</EndGeographicalValue>
									<NumberOfUnits>1</NumberOfUnits>
									<IntervalType>distance</IntervalType>
									<GeographicalUnitRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:1click"/>
								</GeographicalInterval>
								<GeographicalInterval version="1.0" id="myfares:Unit_Distance@gi_2">
									<Name>Two Clicks</Name>
									<StartGeographicalValue>1</StartGeographicalValue>
									<EndGeographicalValue>3</EndGeographicalValue>
									<NumberOfUnits>2</NumberOfUnits>
									<IntervalType>distance</IntervalType>
									<GeographicalUnitRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:1click"/>
								</GeographicalInterval>
							</geographicalIntervals>
							<!--- ===GEOGRAPHICAL STRUCTURE FACTORS==== -->
							<geographicalStructureFactors>
								<GeographicalStructureFactor version="1.0" id="myfares:1click">
									<GeographicalIntervalRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:Unit_Distance@gi_1"/>
									<GeographicalUnitRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:1click"/>
								</GeographicalStructureFactor>
								<GeographicalStructureFactor version="1.0" id="myfares:2click">
									<GeographicalIntervalRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:Unit_Distance@gi_2"/>
									<GeographicalUnitRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:1click"/>
								</GeographicalStructureFactor>
							</geographicalStructureFactors>
							<fareStructureElements>
								<FareStructureElement version="1.0" id="myfares:Unit_Distance@access">
									<distanceMatrixElements>
										<DistanceMatrixElementRef version="any" ref="myfares:SSP_001+SSP_002"/>
										<DistanceMatrixElementRef version="any" ref="myfares:SSP_002+SSP_077"/>
										<DistanceMatrixElementRef version="any" ref="myfares:SSP_077+SSP_078"/>
									</distanceMatrixElements>
									<GenericParameterAssignment order="1" id="myfares:TF01@access" version="1.0">
										<TypeOfAccessRightAssignmentRef version="ntx:v1.0" ref="ntx:can_access"/>
										<ValidityParameterGroupingType>XOR</ValidityParameterGroupingType>
										<validityParameters>
											<OperatorRef version="any" ref="mybus:DTA"/>
											<NetworkRef version="any" ref="mybus:DTA"/>
										</validityParameters>
									</GenericParameterAssignment>
								</FareStructureElement>
								<FareStructureElement id="myfares:Unit_Distance@conditions_of_travel" version="1.0">
									<Name>eligible user types</Name>
									<GenericParameterAssignment version="1.0" order="1" id="myfares:Unit_Distance@conditions_of_travel">
										<Name>Conditions of travel</Name>
										<TypeOfAccessRightAssignmentRef version="ntx:v1.0" ref="ntx:condition_of_use"/>
										<LimitationGroupingType>AND</LimitationGroupingType>
										<limitations>
											<RoundTrip version="1.0" id="myfares:Unit_Distance@conditions_of_travel@trip">
												<Name>Single Trip</Name>
												<TripType>single</TripType>
											</RoundTrip>
											<FrequencyOfUse version="1.0" id="myfares:Unit_Distance@conditions_of_travel@frequency">
												<Name>One trip no transfers</Name>
												<FrequencyOfUseType>single</FrequencyOfUseType>
												<MaximalFrequency>1</MaximalFrequency>
											</FrequencyOfUse>
											<Interchanging version="1.0" id="myfares:Unit_Distance@conditions_of_travel@interchanging">
												<MaximumNumberOfInterchanges>0</MaximumNumberOfInterchanges>
											</Interchanging>
										</limitations>
									</GenericParameterAssignment>
								</FareStructureElement>
							</fareStructureElements>
							<!--- ===DISTANCE MATRIX==== -->
							<distanceMatrixElements>
								<DistanceMatrixElement version="any" id="myfares:SSP_001+SSP_002">
									<Name>Alpha to Bravo</Name>
									<StartStopPointRef version="any" ref="mybus:SSP_001"/>
									<EndStopPointRef version="any" ref="mybus:SSP_002"/>
									<structureFactors>
										<GeographicalStructureFactorRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:1click"/>
									</structureFactors>
								</DistanceMatrixElement>
								<DistanceMatrixElement version="any" id="myfares:SSP_002+SSP_077">
									<Name>Bravo to Charley</Name>
									<StartStopPointRef version="any" ref="mybus:SSP_002"/>
									<EndStopPointRef version="any" ref="mybus:SSP_077"/>
									<structureFactors>
										<GeographicalStructureFactorRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:2click"/>
									</structureFactors>
								</DistanceMatrixElement>
								<DistanceMatrixElement version="any" id="myfares:SSP_077+SSP_078">
									<Name>Charley to Delta</Name>
									<StartStopPointRef version="any" ref="mybus:SSP_077"/>
									<EndStopPointRef version="any" ref="mybus:SSP_078"/>
									<structureFactors>
										<GeographicalStructureFactorRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:1click"/>
									</structureFactors>
								</DistanceMatrixElement>
							</distanceMatrixElements>
							<!-- === PRICES ==== -->
							<priceGroups>
								<PriceGroupRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:Line24_Unit_Distance"/>
							</priceGroups>
						</Tariff>
					</tariffs>
					<!--- ====Fare Product======= -->
					<fareProducts>
						<PreassignedFareProduct version="1.0" id="myfares:SingleTrip">
							<Name>Unit Distrance Trip</Name>
							<TypeOfFareProductRef version="ntx:v1.0" ref="ntx:trip"/>
							<OperatorRef version="any" ref="mybus:DTA"/>
							<!--- ====VALIDABLE ELEMENTs====== -->
							<validableElements>
								<ValidableElement version="1.0" id="myfares:SingleTrip@travel">
									<Name>Single Trip</Name>
									<fareStructureElements>
										<FareStructureElementRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:Unit_Distance@access"/>
										<FareStructureElementRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:Unit_Distance@conditions_of_travel"/>
									</fareStructureElements>
								</ValidableElement>
							</validableElements>
							<!--- ====ACCESS RIGHTs======= -->
							<accessRightsInProduct>
								<AccessRightInProduct version="1.0" id="myfares:SingleTrip@travel" order="1">
									<Name>Single Trip</Name>
									<ValidableElementRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:SingleTrip@travel"/>
								</AccessRightInProduct>
							</accessRightsInProduct>
						</PreassignedFareProduct>
					</fareProducts>
				</FareFrame>
				<!--- =============== FAREs =========== -->
				<FareFrame version="1.0" id="myfares:DTA@Line24_Unit_Distance@prices">
					<FrameDefaults>
						<DefaultCurrency>EUR</DefaultCurrency>
					</FrameDefaults>
					<prerequisites>
						<FareFrameRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:DTA@Line24_Unit_Distance@products"/>
					</prerequisites>
					<!--- ====Fare Prices======= -->
					<priceGroups>
						<PriceGroup version="1.0" id="myfares:Line24_Unit_Distance">
							<Name>Fare Prices - Standard</Name>
							<members>
								<GeographicalIntervalPrice version="1.0" id="myfares:Unit_Distance@gi_1">
									<Amount>1.50</Amount>
									<Units>1</Units>
									<GeographicalIntervalRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:Unit_Distance@gi_1"/>
								</GeographicalIntervalPrice>
								<GeographicalIntervalPrice version="1.0" id="myfares:Unit_Distance@gi_2">
									<Amount>3.00</Amount>
									<Units>2</Units>
									<GeographicalIntervalRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:Unit_Distance@gi_2"/>
								</GeographicalIntervalPrice>
							</members>
						</PriceGroup>
					</priceGroups>
				</FareFrame>
				<!--   ==== COMMON RESOURCES  ==   -->
				<ResourceFrame version="1.0" id="mybus:DTA@Common_Resources">
					<Name>Common resources</Name>
					<codespaces>
						<Codespace id="ntx">
							<Xmlns>ntx</Xmlns>
							<XmlnsUrl>http://netex.org.uk/</XmlnsUrl>
							<Description>Netex built in value</Description>
						</Codespace>
					</codespaces>
					<typesOfValue>
						<ValueSet version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:Types_of_Tariff" classOfValues="TypeOfTariff">
							<Name>Types of Tariff</Name>
							<values>
								<!--- ====Types OfTariff ========= -->
								<TypeOfTariff version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:Distance_kilometers">
									<Name>Kilometer Distance Kilometers</Name>
								</TypeOfTariff>
								<TypeOfTariff version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:flat">
									<Name>Flat</Name>
								</TypeOfTariff>
								<TypeOfTariff version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:point_to_point">
									<Name>Point to point</Name>
								</TypeOfTariff>
								<TypeOfTariff version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:zone_to_zone">
									<Name>Zone to Zone</Name>
								</TypeOfTariff>
								<TypeOfTariff version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:zonal">
									<Name>Zonal</Name>
								</TypeOfTariff>
								<TypeOfTariff version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:unit_distance">
									<Name>Unit distance (count of stops, sections, zones)</Name>
								</TypeOfTariff>
								<TypeOfTariff version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:section">
									<Name>Section</Name>
								</TypeOfTariff>
								<TypeOfTariff version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:banded">
									<Name>Section</Name>
								</TypeOfTariff>
								<TypeOfTariff version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:stored_value">
									<Name>Stored value</Name>

						<ValueSet version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:Types_of_FareProduct" classOfValues="TypeOfFareProduct">
							<Name>Types of Fare Product</Name>
							<values>

label: Bus GeographicFares UnitZone AdultChildProduct
xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!-- ==== Simple Unt Zone Fare  Example ====== 
This example shows the encoding of a unit distance tariff or a simple bus timetable for a linear route in NeTex XML  

There is a complex honecomb zone structure with fares based on the number of zones crossed
 

Data is Fictional 

(C) CEN & Crown Copyright 2018, 2019 
Free to use under a Creative Commons license.

v1.1 Revised & corrected to use Tariff and simpler ids

===================================================

1. OVERVIEW
============

   The Fare structure  has a complex zonal matrix with fares based on the number of zones traversed . 
The zones are as follows

	P - - Q
  /  \   /   \  \
 A - B - C - D
  \  /   /	\	/
    X - - - Y 

The TARIFF is defined in terms of   number of units  between  zones 

Zone  to Zone  Fare matrix as number of zones counted 
    
         A		B		C		D	  P	Q		X		Y
	A   1      2      3     4    2		3		2		4
	B   -      1      2     3     2		2		2		3
	C   -      -    	1     2     3		2		2		2
	D   -      -    	 -      1    3	2		4		2
	P   -      -    	 -      -     1	2		3		4
	Q   -      -    	 -      -     -		1		3 		3
	X   -      -    	 -      -     -		-		1 		2
	Y   -      -    	 -      -     -		-		- 		1 

There are separate FARE PRICEs for a one, zone two zone and three zone units, 

==================================
2. DETAILS

There are TARIFF ZONES zones for the NETWORK  mybus:DTA  and OPERATOR  mybus:DTA 

ZONEs
	    A)   mybus:A  Alpha						 
		B)  mybus:B    Bravo							 
		C)  mybus:C  Charley
		D)  mybus:D  Delta
		P)  mybus:D  Papa
		Q)  mybus:D  Quebec
		X)  mybus:X    Xray
		Y)  mybus:Y   Yankee
 

There are DISTANCE  MATRIX ELEMENTs for   each zone to zone  to point transition,  giving the number of units encountered  e.g.

A  DISTANCE  MATRIX ELEMENT: myfares:A+A 
			GEOGRAPHICAL INTERVAL: myfares:gi_1zone
				Starts at TARIFF ZONE mybus:A 
				Ends at TARIFF mybus:B"/>
				GeographicalStructureFactor 	 GEOGRAPHICAL INTERVAL myfares:gi_1zone
	AB  DISTANCE  MATRIX ELEMENT: myfares:A+B"
			GEOGRAPHICAL INTERVAL: myfares:gi_2zone
				Starts at TARIFF ZONE mybus:A 
				Ends at TARIFF mybus:B"/>
				GeographicalStructureFactor 	 GEOGRAPHICAL INTERVAL myfares:gi_2zone
	AC  DISTANCE  MATRIX ELEMENT: myfares:A+C"
			GEOGRAPHICAL INTERVAL: myfares:gi_2zone
				Starts at TARIFF ZONE mybus:A 
				Ends at TARIFF mybus:C"/>
				GeographicalStructureFactor 	 GEOGRAPHICAL INTERVAL myfares:gi_3zone					 

     ETc Etc   
  

There is a TARIFF   myfares:Stage it has

      (a) GEOGRAPHIC INTERVALS fro 1,2 and 3 stages

	GEOGRAPHICAL INTERVALS are associated with TARIFF ZONES using GEOGRAPHICAL STRUCTURE FACTORs

	GEOGRAPHICAL STRUCTURE FACTOR GeographicalStructureFactor:1zone  :  
			GEOGRAPHICAL INTERVALmyfares:gi_1zone 
			GEOGRAPHICAL I UNIT myfares:1Zone   
	GEOGRAPHICAL STRUCTURE FACTOR GeographicalStructureFactor:2zone  :  
			GEOGRAPHICAL INTERVALmyfares:gi_2zone 
			GEOGRAPHICAL I UNIT myfares:1Zone   
	GEOGRAPHICAL STRUCTURE FACTOR GeographicalStructureFactor:3zone  :  
			GEOGRAPHICAL INTERVALmyfares:gi_3zone 
			GEOGRAPHICAL I UNIT myfares:1Zone   
	GEOGRAPHICAL STRUCTURE FACTOR GeographicalStructureFactor:4zone  :  
			GEOGRAPHICAL INTERVAL myfares:gi_4zone 
			GEOGRAPHICAL I UNIT myfares:1Zone   


      (b) FARE STRUCTURE ELEMENTs f 

		  (i) Access FARE STRUCTURE ELEMENTs for  GEOGRAPHICLA INTERVALs Unit_Distance@access

		(ii) Eligibility  FARE STRUCTURE ELEMENT myfares:Unit_Distance@Eligibility
		USER PROFLE - Adults 17 or over 
		USER PROFLE - Child  16 or under  , discounted  

			(iii) Conditions of Travel ARE STRUCTURE ELEMENT myfares:Unit_Distance@conditions_of_travel
 		FREQUENCY OF USE one trip unlimited myfares:FrequencyOfUse:oneTrip
  		ROUND TRIP OF USE single

There is a SINGLE FARE PRODUCT  
    It has  a VALIDABLE ELEMENT to make a trip using the specified FARE STRUCTURE ELEMENTs
  
There are is a PRICE GROUP with three GEOGRAPHIC INTERVAL PRICes S, each with a price
   (i)   GEOGRAPHICAL INTERVAL  myfares:gi_1zone
		GEOGRAPHICAL INTERVAL PRICE : myfares:GeographicalIntervalPrice:gip_1 
				AMOUNT 1.00 
	   GEOGRAPHICAL INTERVAL PRICE : myfares:GeographicalIntervalPrice:gip_child
				AMOUNT 50%

   (ii) GEOGRAPHICAL INTERVAL  myfares:gi_2zone
		GEOGRAPHICAL INTERVAL PRICE : myfares:GeographicalIntervalPrice:gip_2 
				AMOUNT 1.50 
	GEOGRAPHICAL INTERVAL PRICE : myfares:GeographicalIntervalPrice:gip_child
				AMOUNT 50%

   (iii) GEOGRAPHICAL INTERVAL  myfares:gi_3zone
		GEOGRAPHICAL INTERVAL PRICE : myfares:GeographicalIntervalPrice:gip_3 
				AMOUNT 3.00 
		GEOGRAPHICAL INTERVAL PRICE : myfares:GeographicalIntervalPrice:gip_3_child 
				AMOUNT 50%

   (iv) GEOGRAPHICAL INTERVAL  myfares:gi_4zone
		GEOGRAPHICAL INTERVAL PRICE : myfares:GeographicalIntervalPrice:gip_4 
				AMOUNT 4.00
		GEOGRAPHICAL INTERVAL PRICE : myfares:GeographicalIntervalPrice:gip_4_child 
				AMOUNT 50%


A COMPOSITE FRAME is used to group the component FRAMEs 

		A SERVICE  FRAME is used to contain the STOP POINT  elements   LINE, etc
		A FARE FRAME is used to contain  the FARE product  elements 
		A separate FARE FRAME is used to contain  the FARE prices
 		A RESOURCE is used to contain the GEOGRAPHICAL UNITs, etc
-->
<PublicationDelivery xmlns="http://www.netex.org.uk/netex" xmlns:siri="http://www.siri.org.uk/siri" xmlns:gml="http://www.opengis.net/gml/3.2" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" version="1.0" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.netex.org.uk/netex ../../../xsd/NeTEx_publication.xsd">
	<PublicationTimestamp>2010-12-17T09:30:47.0Z</PublicationTimestamp>
	<ParticipantRef>SYS001</ParticipantRef>
	<!--- ======WHAT WAS REQUESTED ========== -->
	<PublicationRequest version="1.0">
		<RequestTimestamp>2010-12-17T09:30:47.0Z</RequestTimestamp>
		<ParticipantRef>SYS002</ParticipantRef>
		<topics>
			<NetworkFrameTopic>
				<selectionValidityConditions>
					<AvailabilityCondition version="any" id="hde:range">
						<FromDate>2011-01-01T00:00:00Z</FromDate>
					</AvailabilityCondition>
				</selectionValidityConditions>
				<FareFrameRef ref="myfares:any">REQUEST</FareFrameRef>
			</NetworkFrameTopic>
		</topics>
	</PublicationRequest>
	<PublicationRefreshInterval>P1M</PublicationRefreshInterval>
	<Description>Example  of simple point to point fares</Description>
	<!--- =============== RESULTS =========== -->
	<dataObjects>
		<CompositeFrame version="1.0" id="myfares:DTA@Unit_zone">
			<validityConditions>
				<ValidBetween>
					<FromDate>2011-01-01T00:00:00Z</FromDate>
					<ToDate>2011-07-01T00:00:00Z</ToDate>
				</ValidBetween>
			</validityConditions>
			<!--- ======= CODESPACEs======== -->
			<codespaces>
				<Codespace id="mybus">
					<Xmlns>mybus</Xmlns>
					<XmlnsUrl>http://www.mybuses.eu/stuff</XmlnsUrl>
					<Description>My buses</Description>
				</Codespace>
				<Codespace id="myfares">
					<Xmlns>myfares</Xmlns>
					<XmlnsUrl>http://www.myfares,com/fares</XmlnsUrl>
					<Description>Fare  data</Description>
				</Codespace>
			</codespaces>
			<!--- =======FRAME DEFAULTS======== -->
			<FrameDefaults>
				<DefaultCodespaceRef ref="myfares"/>
				<DefaultCurrency>EUR</DefaultCurrency>
			</FrameDefaults>
			<frames>
				<ServiceFrame version="1.0" id="mybus:DTA@Unit_zone@network">
					<Name>Zones for Fare network </Name>
					<prerequisites>
						<ResourceFrameRef version="1.0" ref="mybus:DTA@Common_Resources"/>
					</prerequisites>
					<Network version="any" id="mybus:DTA">
						<OperatorRef version="1.0" ref="mybus:DTA"/>
						<tariffZones>
							<TariffZoneRef version="any" ref="mybus:A"/>
							<TariffZoneRef version="any" ref="mybus:B"/>

	X   -      -    	 -      -     -		-		- 		2
-->
								<DistanceMatrixElement version="any" id="myfares:Y+Y">
									<Name>Yankee  to  Yankee</Name>
									<StartTariffZoneRef version="any" ref="mybus:Y"/>
									<EndTariffZoneRef version="any" ref="mybus:Y"/>
									<structureFactors>
										<GeographicalStructureFactorRef version="any" ref="myfares:1zone"/>
									</structureFactors>
								</DistanceMatrixElement>
							</distanceMatrixElements>
							<!-- === PRICES ==== -->
							<priceGroups>
								<PriceGroupRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:Unit_zone"/>
							</priceGroups>
						</Tariff>
					</tariffs>
					<!--- ====Fare Product======= -->
					<fareProducts>
						<!--- ====ADULT fares==== -->
						<PreassignedFareProduct version="1.0" id="myfares:Trip">
							<Name>Zone Unit Trip  </Name>
							<TypeOfFareProductRef version="ntx:v1.0" ref="ntx:trip"/>
							<OperatorRef version="1.0" ref="mybus:DTA"/>
							<!--- ====VALIDABLE ELEMENTs====== -->
							<validableElements>
								<ValidableElement version="1.0" id="myfares:Trip@travel">
									<Name>Single  ride</Name>
									<fareStructureElements>
										<FareStructureElementRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:Unit_zone@access"/>
										<FareStructureElementRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:Unit_zone@eligibility"/>
										<FareStructureElementRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:Unit_zone@conditions_of_travel"/>
									</fareStructureElements>
								</ValidableElement>
							</validableElements>
							<!--- ====ACCESS RIGHTs======= -->
							<accessRightsInProduct>
								<AccessRightInProduct version="1.0" id="myfares:Trip@travel" order="1">
									<Name>Travel in zones</Name>
									<ValidableElementRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:Trip@travel"/>
								</AccessRightInProduct>
							</accessRightsInProduct>
						</PreassignedFareProduct>
					</fareProducts>
				</FareFrame>
				<FarePriceFrame version="1.0" id="myfares:DTA@Unit_zone@prices">
					<Name>Prices for unit zone </Name>
					<prerequisites>
						<FareFrameRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:DTA@Unit_zone@products"/>
					</prerequisites>
					<!--- ====Pricing Parameters======= -->
					<PricingParameterSet version="1.0" id="myfares:Unit_zone@pp">
						<PriceUnitRef version="any" ref="myfares:pu"/>
						<priceUnits>
							<PriceUnit version="any" id="myfares:pu">
								<Name>Arbitrary Quanitized Unit of Transport Usage - </Name>
							</PriceUnit>
						</priceUnits>
						<pricingRules>
							<DiscountingRule version="any" id="myfares:0%">
								<DiscountAsPercentage>0</DiscountAsPercentage>
							</DiscountingRule>
							<DiscountingRule version="any" id="myfares:50%">
								<DiscountAsPercentage>50</DiscountAsPercentage>
							</DiscountingRule>
						</pricingRules>
					</PricingParameterSet>
					<priceGroups>
						<PriceGroup version="1.0" id="myfares:Unit_zone">
							<Name>Unit fare zones</Name>
							<!--- ====Intervals======= -->
							<members>
								<GeographicalIntervalPrice version="1.0" id="myfares:Unit_zone@gi_1">
									<Amount>1.00</Amount>
									<Units>1</Units>
									<GeographicalIntervalRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:gi_1zone"/>
								</GeographicalIntervalPrice>
								<GeographicalIntervalPrice version="1.0" id="myfares:Unit_zone@gi_2">
									<Amount>1.50</Amount>
									<Units>2</Units>
									<GeographicalIntervalRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:gi_2zone"/>
								</GeographicalIntervalPrice>
								<GeographicalIntervalPrice version="1.0" id="myfares:Unit_zone@gi_3">
									<Amount>3.00</Amount>
									<Units>3</Units>
									<GeographicalIntervalRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:gi_3zone"/>
								</GeographicalIntervalPrice>
								<GeographicalIntervalPrice version="1.0" id="myfares:Unit_zone@gi_4">
									<Amount>4.00</Amount>
									<Units>4</Units>
									<GeographicalIntervalRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:gi_4zone"/>
								</GeographicalIntervalPrice>
							</members>
						</PriceGroup>
					</priceGroups>
				</FarePriceFrame>
				<!--- ====RESOURCE FRAME===== -->
				<ResourceFrame version="1.0" id="mybus:DTA@Common_Resources">
					<codespaces>
						<Codespace id="ntx">
							<Xmlns>ntx</Xmlns>
							<XmlnsUrl>http://netex.org.uk/</XmlnsUrl>
							<Description>Netex built in value</Description>
						</Codespace>
					</codespaces>
					<typesOfValue>
						<ValueSet version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:Types_of_Tariff" classOfValues="TypeOfTariff">
							<Name>Types of Tariff</Name>
							<values>
								<!--- ====Types OfTariff ========= -->
								<TypeOfTariff version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:Distance_kilometers">
									<Name>Kilometer Distance Kilometers</Name>
								</TypeOfTariff>
								<TypeOfTariff version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:flat">
									<Name>Flat</Name>
								</TypeOfTariff>
								<TypeOfTariff version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:point_to_point">
									<Name>Point to point</Name>
								</TypeOfTariff>
								<TypeOfTariff version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:zone_to_zone">
									<Name>Zone to Zone</Name>
								</TypeOfTariff>
								<TypeOfTariff version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:zonal">
									<Name>Zonal</Name>
								</TypeOfTariff>
								<TypeOfTariff version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:unit_distance">
									<Name>Unit distance (count of stops, sections, zones)</Name>
								</TypeOfTariff>
								<TypeOfTariff version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:section">
									<Name>Section</Name>
								</TypeOfTariff>
								<TypeOfTariff version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:banded">
									<Name>Section</Name>
								</TypeOfTariff>
								<TypeOfTariff version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:stored_value">
									<Name>Stored value</Name>
								</TypeOfTariff>
								<TypeOfTariff version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:discount">
									<Name>Discount value</Name>
								</TypeOfTariff>
								<TypeOfTariff version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:multitrip">
									<Name>Multitrip carnet</Name>
								</TypeOfTariff>
								<TypeOfTariff version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:identity_card">
									<Name>SIdentity</Name>
								</TypeOfTariff>
							</values>
						</ValueSet>
						<ValueSet version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:Types_of_FareProduct" classOfValues="TypeOfFareProduct">
							<Name>Types of Fare Product</Name>
							<values>
								<TypeOfFareProduct version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:trip">
									<Name>Trip product</Name>
								</TypeOfFareProduct>
								<TypeOfFareProduct version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:multi_trip">
									<Name>Multitrip / carnet  product</Name>
								</TypeOfFareProduct>
								<TypeOfFareProduct version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:period_pass">
									<Name>Peroid pass product</Name>
								</TypeOfFareProduct>
								<TypeOfFareProduct version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:day_pass">
									<Name>Day pass product</Name>
								</TypeOfFareProduct>
								<TypeOfFareProduct version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:discount_card">
									<Name>Discount  product</Name>
								</TypeOfFareProduct>
							</values>
						</ValueSet>
						<ValueSet version="any" id="myfares:Types_of_Concession" classOfValues="TypeOfConcession">
							<Name>Types of concession</Name>
							<values>
								<!--- ====TypeOfConcession method========= -->
								<TypeOfConcession version="any" id="myfares:adult">
									<Name>Adult</Name>
								</TypeOfConcession>
								<TypeOfConcession version="any" id="myfares:child">
									<Name>Student</Name>
								</TypeOfConcession>
							</values>
						</ValueSet>
						<ValueSet version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:Types_of_AccessRightAssignment" classOfValues="TypeOfAccessRightAssignment">
							<Name>Types of Access Right Assignment</Name>
							<values>
								<TypeOfAccessRightAssignment version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:eligible">
									<Name>Eligible for a product or discount</Name>
								</TypeOfAccessRightAssignment>

									<Name>Grants access rights to use or travel on</Name>

									<Name>Defines a condition or restriction on use</Name>

							</values>
						</ValueSet>
					</typesOfValue>
					<organisations>
						<!--- =====Agency========= -->
						<Operator version="1.0" id="mybus:DTA">

			</frames>
		</CompositeFrame>
