label: Bus GeographicFares UnitFareStage SingleProduct
xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!-- ==== SImple Timetable  Example ====== 
This example shows the encoding of a unit distance fare set for a simple bus timetable for a linear route in NeTex XML  
 
Uses a fare based on the number of units between each point. There is a single FARE PRODUCT 

The number of units are indicated by marking teh fare stages along a route using a SERIES CONSTRAINT

This exampel does not describe a fare tbale, just teh underlying paramters used to compute one.

It woudl eb possible to also add


Data is Fictional 

(C) CEN & Crown Copyright 2018, 2019 
Free to use under a Creative Commons license.

v1.1 Revised & corrected to use Tariff and simpler ids

===================================================
1. OVERVIEW
============

   This has just  eight   stops         A - B - C* - D - E - F* - G - H

There are stages at C  and F 

Point to point  Fare matrix

 
Thus standard units  woudl be calculated as 

         A		B   	C  	 D     E    F    G  H
    H  3      3      2      2       2    1    1    - 	  
    G  3      3      2      2       2    1     - 	
    F  2      2      1      1      1     - 	  
    D  2      2      1      1        - 
    C  1      1 		-
    B  1     	-
    A   -    

 
Price for  Units

1 -  £1,50
2 -  £2.50
3.  £  4.00
==================================
2. DETAILS

There is one Line :  LINE 5

SCHEDULED STOP POINTs
	    A)   mybus:ssp_001  Alpha						 
		B)  mybus:ssp_002   Bravo							 
		C)  mybus:ssp_077	 Charley
		D)  mybus:ssp_078	 Delta
		E)  mybus:ssp_101	 Echo
		F)  mybus:ssp_102	 Foxtrot
         g)  mybus:ssp_103	 Golf
         H)  mybus:ssp_103	 Hotel


There is a SERIES CONSTRAINT myfares:Line_5 which markes th fare stages at  stops C and F

THERE IS A TARIFF   myfares:Stage it has
  x

There is a TARIFF   myfares:Stage it has

      (a) GEOGRAPHIC INTERVALS for  1,2 and 3 stages

There are Three GEOGRAPHIC INTERVALS, each with a price
	1 Step: GEOGRAPHICAL INTERVAL: myfares:Stage@gi_1
		GEOGRAPHICAL INTERVALPRICE:  myfares:Stage@gi_1   1 Unite  1.00  EUR
	2 Steps: GEOGRAPHICAL INTERVAL: myfares:Stage@gi_2
		GEOGRAPHICAL INTERVALPRICE:  myfares:Stage@gip_2   2 Units  3,0 EUR 
	3 Steps: GEOGRAPHICAL INTERVAL: myfares:Stage@gi_3
		GEOGRAPHICAL INTERVALPRICE:  myfares:Stage@gip_2   2 Units  4,5 EUR 

      (b) FARE STRUCTURE ELEMENTs  

		  (i) Access FARE STRUCTURE ELEMENTs for  GEOGRAPHICLA INTERVALs Unit_stage@access
				   for SEERIES CONSTRAINT and line 

		(ii) Conditions of Travel ARE STRUCTURE ELEMENT myfares:Unit_Distance@conditions_of_travel
 		FREQUENCY OF USE one trip unlimited myfares:FrequencyOfUse:oneTrip
  		ROUND TRIP OF USE single

There is a SINGLE FARE PRODUCT  
    It has  a VALIDABLE ELEMENT to make a trip using the specified FARE STRUCTURE ELEMENTs
  
There are is a PRICE GROUP with three GEOGRAPHIC INTERVAL PRICes S, each with a price 
	1 Step: 	GEOGRAPHICAL INTERVALPRICE:  myfares:Stage@gi_1   1 Unite  1.00  EUR
	2 Steps: 	GEOGRAPHICAL INTERVALPRICE:  myfares:Stage@gip_2   2 Units  3,0 EUR 
	3 Steps: 	GEOGRAPHICAL INTERVALPRICE:  myfares:Stage@gip_2   2 Units  4,5 EUR 


A COMPOSITE FRAME is used to group the component FRAMEs 

		A SERVICE  FRAME is used to contain the STOP POINT  elements   LINE, etc
		A FARE FRAME is used to contain  the FARE product  elements 
		A separate FARE FRAME is used to contain  the FARE prices
 		A RESOURCE is used to contain the GEOGRAPHICAL UNITs, etc
-->
<PublicationDelivery xmlns="http://www.netex.org.uk/netex" xmlns:siri="http://www.siri.org.uk/siri" xmlns:gml="http://www.opengis.net/gml/3.2" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" version="1.0" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.netex.org.uk/netex ../../../xsd/NeTEx_publication.xsd">
	<PublicationTimestamp>2010-12-17T09:30:47.0Z</PublicationTimestamp>
	<ParticipantRef>SYS001</ParticipantRef>
	<!--- ======WHAT WAS REQUESTED ========== -->
	<PublicationRequest version="1.0">
		<RequestTimestamp>2010-12-17T09:30:47.0Z</RequestTimestamp>
		<ParticipantRef>SYS002</ParticipantRef>
		<topics>
			<NetworkFrameTopic>
				<selectionValidityConditions>
					<AvailabilityCondition version="any" id="hde:range">
						<FromDate>2011-01-01T00:00:00Z</FromDate>
					</AvailabilityCondition>
				</selectionValidityConditions>
				<FareFrameRef ref="myfares:any">REQUEST</FareFrameRef>
			</NetworkFrameTopic>
		</topics>
	</PublicationRequest>
	<PublicationRefreshInterval>P1M</PublicationRefreshInterval>
	<Description>Example  of simple point to point fares</Description>
	<!--- =============== RESULTS =========== -->
	<dataObjects>
		<CompositeFrame version="1.0" id="myfares:DTA@Fare_Stage">
			<validityConditions>
				<ValidBetween>
					<FromDate>2011-01-01T00:00:00Z</FromDate>
					<ToDate>2011-07-01T00:00:00Z</ToDate>
				</ValidBetween>
			</validityConditions>
			<!--- ======= CODESPACEs======== -->
			<codespaces>
				<Codespace id="mybus">
					<Xmlns>mybus</Xmlns>
					<XmlnsUrl>http://www.mybuses.eu/stuff</XmlnsUrl>
					<Description>My buses</Description>
				</Codespace>
				<Codespace id="myfares">
					<Xmlns>myfares</Xmlns>
					<XmlnsUrl>http://www.myfares,com/fares</XmlnsUrl>
					<Description>Fare data</Description>
				</Codespace>
			</codespaces>
			<!--- =======FRAME DEFAULTS======== -->
			<FrameDefaults>
				<DefaultCodespaceRef ref="myfares"/>
				<DefaultCurrency>EUR</DefaultCurrency>
			</FrameDefaults>
			<frames>
				<ServiceFrame version="1.0" id="mybus:DTA@Fare_Stage@network">
					<Name>Stops for Fare network </Name>
					<prerequisites>
						<ResourceFrameRef version="1.0" ref="mybus:DTA@Common_Resources"/>
					</prerequisites>
					<!--- =========LINEs=========== -->
					<lines>
						<Line version="1.0" id="mybus:line_5">
							<Name>Line 5</Name>
							<OperatorRef version="1.0" ref="mybus:DTA"/>
						</Line>
					</lines>
					<!--- =========STOP POINTs============ -->
					<scheduledStopPoints>
						<ScheduledStopPoint version="any" id="mybus:SSP_001">
							<Name>Alpha & Castle</Name>
							<Location>
								<Longitude>53.0000</Longitude>
								<Latitude>0.1000</Latitude>
							</Location>
							<TimingPointStatus>timingPoint</TimingPointStatus>
							<ShortName>Alpha</ShortName>
							<PublicCode>ALPH</PublicCode>
							<StopType>onstreetBus</StopType>
							<VehicleModes>bus</VehicleModes>
						</ScheduledStopPoint>
						<ScheduledStopPoint version="any" id="mybus:SSP_002">
							<Name>Bravo Street</Name>
							<Location>
								<Longitude>53.2000</Longitude>
								<Latitude>0.2000</Latitude>
							</Location>
							<TimingPointStatus>timingPoint</TimingPointStatus>
							<ShortName>Bravo</ShortName>
							<PublicCode>BRAV</PublicCode>
							<StopType>onstreetBus</StopType>
							<VehicleModes>bus</VehicleModes>
						</ScheduledStopPoint>
						<ScheduledStopPoint version="any" id="mybus:SSP_077">
							<Name>Charley Crescent</Name>
							<Location>
								<Longitude>53.3000</Longitude>
								<Latitude>0.3000</Latitude>
							</Location>
							<TimingPointStatus>timingPoint</TimingPointStatus>
							<ShortName>Charley</ShortName>
							<PublicCode>CHAS</PublicCode>
							<StopType>onstreetBus</StopType>
							<VehicleModes>bus</VehicleModes>
						</ScheduledStopPoint>
						<ScheduledStopPoint version="any" id="mybus:SSP_078">
							<Name>Delta Force</Name>
							<Location>
								<Longitude>53.4000</Longitude>
								<Latitude>0.4000</Latitude>
							</Location>
							<TimingPointStatus>timingPoint</TimingPointStatus>
							<ShortName>Delta</ShortName>
							<PublicCode>DELTA</PublicCode>
							<StopType>onstreetBus</StopType>
							<VehicleModes>bus</VehicleModes>
						</ScheduledStopPoint>
						<ScheduledStopPoint version="any" id="mybus:SSP_101">
							<Name>Echo Chambers </Name>
							<Location>
								<Longitude>53.3000</Longitude>
								<Latitude>0.3000</Latitude>
							</Location>
							<TimingPointStatus>timingPoint</TimingPointStatus>
							<ShortName>Echo</ShortName>
							<PublicCode>ECHO</PublicCode>
							<StopType>onstreetBus</StopType>
							<VehicleModes>bus</VehicleModes>
						</ScheduledStopPoint>
						<ScheduledStopPoint version="any" id="mybus:SSP_102">
							<Name>Foxtrot Tango</Name>
							<Location>
								<Longitude>53.5000</Longitude>
								<Latitude>0.5000</Latitude>
							</Location>
							<TimingPointStatus>timingPoint</TimingPointStatus>
							<ShortName>Foxtrot</ShortName>
							<PublicCode>FOXTROT</PublicCode>
							<StopType>onstreetBus</StopType>
							<VehicleModes>bus</VehicleModes>
						</ScheduledStopPoint>
						<ScheduledStopPoint version="any" id="mybus:SSP_103">
							<Name>Golf Course </Name>
							<Location>
								<Longitude>53.6000</Longitude>
								<Latitude>0.6000</Latitude>
							</Location>
							<TimingPointStatus>timingPoint</TimingPointStatus>
							<ShortName>Golf</ShortName>
							<PublicCode>GOLF</PublicCode>
							<StopType>onstreetBus</StopType>
							<VehicleModes>bus</VehicleModes>
						</ScheduledStopPoint>
						<ScheduledStopPoint version="any" id="mybus:SSP_104">
							<Name>Hotel Bristol </Name>
							<Location>
								<Longitude>53.7000</Longitude>
								<Latitude>0.7000</Latitude>
							</Location>
							<TimingPointStatus>timingPoint</TimingPointStatus>
							<ShortName>Hotel</ShortName>
							<PublicCode>HOTEL</PublicCode>
							<StopType>onstreetBus</StopType>
							<VehicleModes>bus</VehicleModes>
						</ScheduledStopPoint>
					</scheduledStopPoints>
				</ServiceFrame>
				<!--- =============== FAREs =========== -->
				<FareFrame version="1.0" id="myfares:DTA@Fare_Stage@products">
					<prerequisites>
						<ServiceFrameRef version="1.0" ref="mybus:DTA@Fare_Stage@network"/>
					</prerequisites>
					<seriesConstraints>
						<SeriesConstraint version="1.0" id="myfares:Line_5-1">
							<Name>Line 1 normal service: fare stages </Name>
							<farePointsInPattern>
								<FarePointInPattern version="1.0" id="myfares:Line_5-1">
									<ScheduledStopPointRef version="any" ref="mybus:SSP_001">Alpha</ScheduledStopPointRef>
								</FarePointInPattern>
								<FarePointInPattern version="1.0" id="myfares:Line_5-2">
									<ScheduledStopPointRef version="any" ref="mybus:SSP_002">Bravo</ScheduledStopPointRef>
								</FarePointInPattern>
								<FarePointInPattern version="1.0" id="myfares:Line_5-3">
									<ScheduledStopPointRef version="any" ref="mybus:SSP_077">Charley</ScheduledStopPointRef>
									<PresentationPosition>required</PresentationPosition>
								</FarePointInPattern>
								<FarePointInPattern version="1.0" id="myfares:Line_5-4">
									<ScheduledStopPointRef version="any" ref="mybus:SSP_078">Delta</ScheduledStopPointRef>
								</FarePointInPattern>
								<FarePointInPattern version="1.0" id="myfares:Line_5-5">
									<ScheduledStopPointRef version="any" ref="mybus:SSP_101">Echo</ScheduledStopPointRef>
								</FarePointInPattern>
								<FarePointInPattern version="1.0" id="myfares:Line_5-6">
									<ScheduledStopPointRef version="any" ref="mybus:SSP_102">Foxtrot</ScheduledStopPointRef>
									<PresentationPosition>required</PresentationPosition>
								</FarePointInPattern>
								<FarePointInPattern version="1.0" id="myfares:Line_5-7">
									<ScheduledStopPointRef version="any" ref="mybus:SSP_103">Golf</ScheduledStopPointRef>
								</FarePointInPattern>
								<FarePointInPattern version="1.0" id="myfares:Line_5-8">
									<ScheduledStopPointRef version="any" ref="mybus:SSP_104">Hotel</ScheduledStopPointRef>
								</FarePointInPattern>
							</farePointsInPattern>
						</SeriesConstraint>
					</seriesConstraints>
					<!--- ====Fare Structure======= -->
					<geographicalUnits>
						<!--- ====GeographicalU nit======== -->
						<GeographicalUnit version="any" id="myfares:1click">
							<Name>Arbitrary Quantized Unit of Transport Usage</Name>
						</GeographicalUnit>
					</geographicalUnits>
					<tariffs>
						<Tariff version="1.0" id="myfares:Stage">
							<Name>Unit distance fare.</Name>
							<OperatorRef version="1.0" ref="mybus:DTA"/>
							<TypeOfTariffRef version="ntx:v1.0" ref="ntx:section"/>
							<GeographicalUnitRef version="any" ref="myfares:1click"/>
							<geographicalIntervals>
								<GeographicalInterval version="1.0" id="myfares:Stage@gi_1">
									<Name>One Click</Name>
									<StartGeographicalValue>1</StartGeographicalValue>
									<EndGeographicalValue>1</EndGeographicalValue>
									<NumberOfUnits>1</NumberOfUnits>
									<IntervalType>section</IntervalType>
									<GeographicalUnitRef version="any" ref="myfares:1click"/>
								</GeographicalInterval>
								<GeographicalInterval version="1.0" id="myfares:Stage@gi_2">
									<Name>Two Clicks</Name>
									<StartGeographicalValue>1</StartGeographicalValue>
									<EndGeographicalValue>2</EndGeographicalValue>
									<NumberOfUnits>2</NumberOfUnits>
									<IntervalType>section</IntervalType>
									<GeographicalUnitRef version="any" ref="myfares:1click"/>
								</GeographicalInterval>
								<GeographicalInterval version="1.0" id="myfares:Stage@gi_3">
									<Name>Two Clicks</Name>
									<StartGeographicalValue>1</StartGeographicalValue>
									<EndGeographicalValue>3</EndGeographicalValue>
									<NumberOfUnits>3</NumberOfUnits>
									<IntervalType>section</IntervalType>
									<GeographicalUnitRef version="any" ref="myfares:1click"/>
								</GeographicalInterval>
							</geographicalIntervals>
							<!--- ===FARE STRUCTURE ELEMENTS==== -->
							<fareStructureElements>
								<FareStructureElement version="1.0" id="myfares:Stage@access">
									<GenericParameterAssignment id="myfares:Tz2z@access-1" version="1.0">
										<TypeOfAccessRightAssignmentRef version="ntx:v1.0" ref="ntx:can_access"/>
										<ValidityParameterGroupingType>XOR</ValidityParameterGroupingType>
										<validityParameters>
											<LineRef version="1.0" ref="mybus:line_5"/>
											<SeriesConstraintRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:Line_5-1"/>
										</validityParameters>
									</GenericParameterAssignment>
								</FareStructureElement>
								<FareStructureElement id="myfares:Stage@conditions_of_travel" version="1.0">
									<Name>eligible user types</Name>
									<GenericParameterAssignment version="1.0" id="myfares:Stage@conditions_of_travel-1">
										<Name>Conditions of travel</Name>
										<TypeOfAccessRightAssignmentRef version="ntx:v1.0" ref="ntx:condition_of_use"/>
										<LimitationGroupingType>AND</LimitationGroupingType>
										<limitations>
											<RoundTrip version="1.0" id="myfares:Stage@conditions_of_travel@trip">
												<Name>Single Trip</Name>
												<TripType>single</TripType>
											</RoundTrip>
											<FrequencyOfUse version="1.0" id="myfares:Stage@conditions_of_travel@frequency">
												<Name>One trip no transfers</Name>
												<FrequencyOfUseType>single</FrequencyOfUseType>
												<MaximalFrequency>1</MaximalFrequency>
											</FrequencyOfUse>
											<Interchanging version="1.0" id="myfares:Stage@conditions_of_travel@interchanging">
												<MaximumNumberOfInterchanges>0</MaximumNumberOfInterchanges>
											</Interchanging>
										</limitations>
									</GenericParameterAssignment>
								</FareStructureElement>
							</fareStructureElements>
						</Tariff>
					</tariffs>
					<!--- ====Fare Product======= -->
					<fareProducts>
						<PreassignedFareProduct version="1.0" id="myfares:Single_trip">
							<Name>Point  to Point  fare</Name>
							<TypeOfFareProductRef version="ntx:v1.0" ref="ntx:trip"/>
							<OperatorRef version="1.0" ref="mybus:DTA"/>
							<!--- ====VALIDABLE ELEMENTs====== -->
							<validableElements>
								<ValidableElement version="1.0" id="myfares:Single_trip@travel">
									<Name>Single  Trip</Name>
									<fareStructureElements>
										<FareStructureElementRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:Stage@access"/>
										<FareStructureElementRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:Stage@conditions_of_travel"/>
									</fareStructureElements>
								</ValidableElement>
							</validableElements>
							<!--- ====ACCESS RIGHTs======= -->
							<accessRightsInProduct>
								<AccessRightInProduct version="1.0" id="myfares:Single_trip@travel-1">
									<Name>First ride</Name>
									<ValidableElementRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:Single_trip@travel"/>
								</AccessRightInProduct>
							</accessRightsInProduct>
						</PreassignedFareProduct>
					</fareProducts>
				</FareFrame>
				<!--- =============== FAREs =========== -->
				<FareFrame version="1.0" id="myfares:DTA@Fare_Stage@prices">
					<prerequisites>
						<FareFrameRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:DTA@Fare_Stage@products"/>
					</prerequisites>
					<!--- ====Fare Prices======= -->
					<priceGroups>
						<PriceGroup version="1.0" id="myfares:Unit DIstance">
							<Name>Fare Prices  - Standard</Name>
							<members>
								<GeographicalIntervalPrice version="1.0" id="myfares:Stage@gi_1">
									<Amount>1.50</Amount>
									<Units>1</Units>
									<GeographicalIntervalRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:Stage@gi_1"/>
								</GeographicalIntervalPrice>
								<GeographicalIntervalPrice version="1.0" id="myfares:Stage@gi_2">
									<Amount>2.50</Amount>
									<Units>2</Units>
									<GeographicalIntervalRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:Stage@gi_2"/>
								</GeographicalIntervalPrice>
								<GeographicalIntervalPrice version="1.0" id="myfares:Stage@gi_3">
									<Amount>4.00</Amount>
									<Units>3</Units>
									<GeographicalIntervalRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:Stage@gi_3"/>
								</GeographicalIntervalPrice>
							</members>
						</PriceGroup>
					</priceGroups>
				</FareFrame>
				<!--- ====RESOURCE FRAME===== -->
				<ResourceFrame version="1.0" id="mybus:DTA@Common_Resources">
					<codespaces>
						<Codespace id="ntx">
							<Xmlns>ntx</Xmlns>
							<XmlnsUrl>http://netex.org.uk/</XmlnsUrl>
							<Description>Netex built in value</Description>
						</Codespace>
					</codespaces>
					<typesOfValue>
						<ValueSet version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:Types_of_Tariff" classOfValues="TypeOfTariff">
							<Name>Types of Tariff</Name>
							<values>
								<!--- ====Types OfTariff ========= -->
								<TypeOfTariff version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:Distance_kilometers">
									<Name>Kilometer Distance Kilometers</Name>
								</TypeOfTariff>
								<TypeOfTariff version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:flat">
									<Name>Flat</Name>
								</TypeOfTariff>
								<TypeOfTariff version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:point_to_point">
									<Name>Point to point</Name>
								</TypeOfTariff>
								<TypeOfTariff version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:zone_to_zone">
									<Name>Zone to Zone</Name>
								</TypeOfTariff>
								<TypeOfTariff version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:zonal">
									<Name>Zonal</Name>
								</TypeOfTariff>
								<TypeOfTariff version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:unit_distance">
									<Name>Unit distance (count of stops, sections, zones)</Name>
								</TypeOfTariff>
								<TypeOfTariff version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:section">
									<Name>Section</Name>
								</TypeOfTariff>
								<TypeOfTariff version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:banded">
									<Name>Section</Name>
								</TypeOfTariff>
								<TypeOfTariff version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:stored_value">
									<Name>Stored value</Name>
								</TypeOfTariff>
								<TypeOfTariff version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:discount">
									<Name>Discount value</Name>
								</TypeOfTariff>
								<TypeOfTariff version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:multitrip">
									<Name>Multitrip carnet</Name>
								</TypeOfTariff>
								<TypeOfTariff version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:identity_card">
									<Name>SIdentity</Name>
								</TypeOfTariff>
							</values>
						</ValueSet>
						<ValueSet version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:Types_of_FareProduct" classOfValues="TypeOfFareProduct">
							<Name>Types of Fare Product</Name>
							<values>
								<TypeOfFareProduct version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:trip">
									<Name>Trip product</Name>
								</TypeOfFareProduct>
								<TypeOfFareProduct version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:multi_trip">
									<Name>Multitrip / carnet  product</Name>
								</TypeOfFareProduct>
								<TypeOfFareProduct version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:period_pass">
									<Name>Peroid pass product</Name>
								</TypeOfFareProduct>
								<TypeOfFareProduct version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:day_pass">
									<Name>Day pass product</Name>
								</TypeOfFareProduct>
								<TypeOfFareProduct version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:discount_card">
									<Name>Discount  product</Name>
								</TypeOfFareProduct>
							</values>
						</ValueSet>
						<ValueSet version="any" id="myfares:Types_of_Concession" classOfValues="TypeOfConcession">
							<Name>Types of concession</Name>
							<values>
								<!--- ====TypeOfConcession method========= -->
								<TypeOfConcession version="any" id="myfares:adult">
									<Name>Adult</Name>
								</TypeOfConcession>
								<TypeOfConcession version="any" id="myfares:child">
									<Name>Student</Name>
								</TypeOfConcession>
							</values>
						</ValueSet>
						<ValueSet version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:Types_of_AccessRightAssignment" classOfValues="TypeOfAccessRightAssignment">
							<Name>Types of Access Right Assignment</Name>
							<values>
								<TypeOfAccessRightAssignment version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:eligible">
									<Name>Eligible for a product or discount</Name>
								</TypeOfAccessRightAssignment>
								<TypeOfAccessRightAssignment version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:can_access">
									<Name>Grants access rights to use or travel on</Name>
								</TypeOfAccessRightAssignment>
								<TypeOfAccessRightAssignment version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:condition_of_use">
									<Name>Defines a condition or restriction on use</Name>
								</TypeOfAccessRightAssignment>
							</values>
						</ValueSet>
					</typesOfValue>
					<organisations>
						<!--- =====Agency========= -->
						<Operator version="1.0" id="mybus:DTA">
							<Name>Demo Transit Authority</Name>
						</Operator>
					</organisations>
				</ResourceFrame>
			</frames>
		</CompositeFrame>
	</dataObjects>
</PublicationDelivery>

label: Bus GeographicFares HierarchicalZone MultipleOffers
xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!-- ==== Simple Hierarchical Zonal Fare  Example ====== 
This example shows the encoding of a zonal tariff for a simple bus timetable for a linear route in NeTex XML  

There is a complex honecomb zone structure with fares based on the number of zones crossed

 

Data is Fictional 

(C) CEN & Crown Copyright 2018, 2019 
Free to use under a Creative Commons license.

v1.1 Revised & corrected to use Tariff and simpler ids

===================================================

1. OVERVIEW
============

   The Fare structure  has a simple concentric  zonal matrix with fares based Single zone two zone or three zones used . 
The zones are as follows

CCCCCCCCCCCCCCC       
C								C       
C		BBBBBBBB		C       
C		B		 		B		C        
C		B		A		B		C      
C		B		 		B		C       
C		BBBBBBBB		C       
C								C   
CCCCCCCCCCCCCCC     
    
The TARIFF is  defined in terms of   number of units  between  zones 

Zone  to Zone  Fare matrix as number of zones counted 
    
         A		B		C		 
	A   1      2      3     
	B   2      1      2     
	C   3 	 2   	1     
 
There are separate FARE PRICEs for a one, zone two zone and three zone units, and separate FARE PRODUCTs.

==================================
2. DETAILS

There are TARIFF ZONEs for the NETWORK  mybus:DTA

FARE ZONEs
	    A)   mybus:A  Alpha						 
		B)  mybus:B    Bravo							 
		C)  mybus:C  Charley
		 
There are DISTANCE  MATRIX ELEMENTs for   each zone to zone  to point transition,  e.g.

	AA  DISTANCE  MATRIX ELEMENT: myfares:A+A 
			GEOGRAPHICAL INTERVAL: myfares:gi_1
				Stars at TARIFF ZONE mybus:A 
				Ends at TARIFF mybus:B"/>
				GeographicalStructureFactor 	 GEOGRAPHICAL INTERVAL myfares:gi_1
	AB  DISTANCE  MATRIX ELEMENT: myfares:A+B"
			GEOGRAPHICAL INTERVAL: myfares:gi_2
				Stars at TARIFF ZONE mybus:A 
				Ends at TARIFF mybus:B"/>
				GeographicalStructureFactor 	 GEOGRAPHICAL INTERVAL myfares:gi_2
	AC  DISTANCE  MATRIX ELEMENT: myfares:A+C"
			GEOGRAPHICAL INTERVAL: myfares:gi_2
				Stars at TARIFF ZONE mybus:A 
				Ends at TARIFF mybus:C"/>
				GeographicalStructureFactor 	 GEOGRAPHICAL INTERVAL myfares:gi_3					 

     ETc Etc 
 
There is a TARIFF   myfares:Stage it has

      (a) GEOGRAPHIC INTERVALS fro 1,2 and 3 stages

	Zone use Units are defined and priced  with  GEOGRAPHICAL INTERVALs
   GEOGRAPHICAL INTERVAL  myfares:gi_2
		GEOGRAPHICAL INTERVAL PRICE : myfares:GeographicalIntervalPrice:gip_2 
				AMOUNT 1.50  
    GEOGRAPHICAL INTERVAL  myfares:gi_3
		GEOGRAPHICAL INTERVAL PRICE : myfares:GeographicalIntervalPrice:gip_3 
				AMOUNT 3.00  
   GEOGRAPHICAL INTERVAL  myfares:gi_4
		GEOGRAPHICAL INTERVAL PRICE : myfares:GeographicalIntervalPrice:gip_4 
				AMOUNT 4.00 


      (b) FARE STRUCTURE ELEMENTs  

		  (i) Access FARE STRUCTURE ELEMENTs for  GEOGRAPHICAL   INTERVALs Unit_Zone@access

	 	(ii) Conditions of Travel ARE STRUCTURE ELEMENT myfares:Unit_Distance@conditions_of_travel
 		FREQUENCY OF USE one trip unlimited myfares:FrequencyOfUse:oneTrip
  		ROUND TRIP OF USE single

There is a SINGLE FARE PRODUCT  
    It has  a VALIDABLE ELEMENT to make a trip using the specified FARE STRUCTURE ELEMENTs



There are two SALE OFFER PACKAGES, one for printed ticket , one for a dmobile app, but the prices are the same  
    It has  a VALIDABLE ELEMENT to make a trip using the specified FARE STRUCTURE ELEMENTs
  
There are is a PRICE GROUP with three GEOGRAPHIC INTERVAL PRICes  , each with a price
 
		GEOGRAPHICAL INTERVAL PRICE : myfares:GeographicalIntervalPrice:gip_2 
				AMOUNT 1.50   
		GEOGRAPHICAL INTERVAL PRICE : myfares:GeographicalIntervalPrice:gip_3 
				AMOUNT 3.00   
		GEOGRAPHICAL INTERVAL PRICE : myfares:GeographicalIntervalPrice:gip_4 
				AMOUNT 4.00 

A COMPOSITE FRAME is used to group the component FRAMEs 

		A SERVICE  FRAME is used to contain the STOP POINT  elements   LINE, etc
		A FARE FRAME is used to contain  the FARE product  elements 
		A separate FARE FRAME is used to contain  the FARE prices
 		A RESOURCE is used to contain the GEOGRAPHICAL UNITs, etc
-->
<PublicationDelivery xmlns="http://www.netex.org.uk/netex" xmlns:siri="http://www.siri.org.uk/siri" xmlns:gml="http://www.opengis.net/gml/3.2" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" version="1.0" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.netex.org.uk/netex ../../../xsd/NeTEx_publication.xsd">
	<PublicationTimestamp>2010-12-17T09:30:47.0Z</PublicationTimestamp>
	<ParticipantRef>SYS001</ParticipantRef>
	<!--- ======WHAT WAS REQUESTED ========== -->
	<PublicationRequest version="1.0">
		<RequestTimestamp>2010-12-17T09:30:47.0Z</RequestTimestamp>
		<ParticipantRef>SYS002</ParticipantRef>
		<topics>
			<NetworkFrameTopic>
				<selectionValidityConditions>
					<AvailabilityCondition version="any" id="hde:range">
						<FromDate>2011-01-01T00:00:00Z</FromDate>
					</AvailabilityCondition>
				</selectionValidityConditions>
				<FareFrameRef ref="myfares:any">REQUEST</FareFrameRef>
			</NetworkFrameTopic>
		</topics>
	</PublicationRequest>
	<PublicationRefreshInterval>P1M</PublicationRefreshInterval>
	<Description>Example  of simple point to point fares</Description>
	<!--- =============== RESULTS =========== -->
	<dataObjects>
		<CompositeFrame version="1.0" id="myfares:DTA@Nested_Zone">
			<validityConditions>
				<ValidBetween>
					<FromDate>2011-01-01T00:00:00Z</FromDate>
					<ToDate>2011-07-01T00:00:00Z</ToDate>
				</ValidBetween>
			</validityConditions>
			<!--- ======= CODESPACEs======== -->
			<codespaces>
				<Codespace id="mybus">
					<Xmlns>mybus</Xmlns>
					<XmlnsUrl>http://www.mybuses.eu/stuff</XmlnsUrl>
					<Description>My buses</Description>
				</Codespace>
				<Codespace id="myfares">
					<Xmlns>myfares</Xmlns>
					<XmlnsUrl>http://www.myfares,com/fares</XmlnsUrl>
					<Description>Fare data</Description>
				</Codespace>
			</codespaces>
			<!--- =======FRAME DEFAULTS======== -->
			<FrameDefaults>
				<DefaultCodespaceRef ref="myfares"/>
				<DefaultCurrency>EUR</DefaultCurrency>
			</FrameDefaults>
			<frames>
				<ServiceFrame version="1.0" id="mybus:DTA@Nested_Zone@network">
					<Name>Stops for Fare network </Name>
					<prerequisites>
						<ResourceFrameRef version="1.0" ref="mybus:DTA@Common_Resources"/>
					</prerequisites>
					<Network version="any" id="mybus:DTA">
						<OperatorRef version="any" ref="mybus:DTA"/>
						<tariffZones>
							<TariffZoneRef version="any" ref="mybus:A"/>
							<TariffZoneRef version="any" ref="mybus:B"/>
							<TariffZoneRef version="any" ref="mybus:C"/>
						</tariffZones>
					</Network>
					<!--- =========STOP POINTs============ -->
					<tariffZones>
						<FareZone version="any" id="mybus:A">
							<Name>Alpha </Name>
							<ShortName>A</ShortName>
							<ParentZoneRef version="any" ref="mybus:B"/>
						</FareZone>
						<FareZone version="any" id="mybus:B">
							<Name>Bravo  </Name>
							<ShortName>B</ShortName>
							<ParentZoneRef version="any" ref="mybus:C"/>
							<contains>
								<TariffZoneRef version="any" ref="mybus:A"/>
							</contains>
						</FareZone>
						<FareZone version="any" id="mybus:C">
							<Name>Charley  </Name>
							<ShortName>C</ShortName>
							<contains>
								<TariffZoneRef version="any" ref="mybus:B"/>
							</contains>
						</FareZone>
					</tariffZones>
				</ServiceFrame>
				<!--- =============== FAREs =========== -->
				<FareFrame version="1.0" id="myfares:DTA@Nested_Zone@products">
					<prerequisites>
						<ServiceFrameRef version="1.0" ref="mybus:DTA@Nested_Zone@network"/>
					</prerequisites>
					<!--- ====Fare Structure======= -->
					<geographicalUnits>
						<!--- ====GeographicalU nit======== -->
						<GeographicalUnit version="any" id="myfares:gu">
							<Name>Arbitrary Quantized Unit of Transport Usage - One zone to zone hop</Name>
						</GeographicalUnit>
					</geographicalUnits>
					<tariffs>
						<Tariff version="1.0" id="myfares:Nested_Zone">
							<Name>Zonal fares - Nested zones</Name>
							<OperatorRef version="any" ref="mybus:DTA"/>
							<TypeOfTariffRef version="ntx:v1.0" ref="ntx:zonal"/>
							<GeographicalUnitRef version="any" ref="myfares:gu"/>
							<!--- ===GEOGRAPHICAL INTERVALs === -->
							<geographicalIntervals>
								<GeographicalInterval version="1.0" id="myfares:gi_1zone">
									<Name>Same zone</Name>
									<NumberOfUnits>1</NumberOfUnits>
									<IntervalType>tariffZone</IntervalType>
									<prices>
										<GeographicalIntervalPriceRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:Nested_Zone@gi_1"/>
									</prices>
								</GeographicalInterval>
								<GeographicalInterval version="1.0" id="myfares:gi_2zone">
									<Name>Two Zones</Name>
									<NumberOfUnits>2</NumberOfUnits>
									<IntervalType>tariffZone</IntervalType>
									<prices>
										<GeographicalIntervalPriceRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:Nested_Zone@gi_2"/>
									</prices>
								</GeographicalInterval>
								<GeographicalInterval version="1.0" id="myfares:gi_3zone">
									<Name>Three Zones</Name>
									<NumberOfUnits>3</NumberOfUnits>
									<IntervalType>tariffZone</IntervalType>
									<prices>
										<GeographicalIntervalPriceRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:Nested_Zone@gi_3"/>
									</prices>
								</GeographicalInterval>
							</geographicalIntervals>
							<!--- ===GEOGRAPHICAL STRUCTURE FACTORS==== -->
							<geographicalStructureFactors>
								<GeographicalStructureFactor version="1.0" id="myfares:1zone">
									<GeographicalIntervalRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:gi_1zone"/>
									<GeographicalUnitRef version="any" ref="myfares:gu"/>
								</GeographicalStructureFactor>
								<GeographicalStructureFactor version="1.0" id="myfares:2zone">
									<GeographicalIntervalRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:gi_2zone"/>
									<GeographicalUnitRef version="any" ref="myfares:gu"/>
								</GeographicalStructureFactor>
								<GeographicalStructureFactor version="1.0" id="myfares:3zone">
									<GeographicalIntervalRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:gi_3zone"/>
									<GeographicalUnitRef version="any" ref="myfares:gu"/>
								</GeographicalStructureFactor>
							</geographicalStructureFactors>
							<fareStructureElements>
								<FareStructureElement version="1.0" id="myfares:Nested_Zone@access">
									<distanceMatrixElements>
										<DistanceMatrixElementRef version="any" ref="myfares:A+A"/>
										<DistanceMatrixElementRef version="any" ref="myfares:A+B"/>
										<DistanceMatrixElementRef version="any" ref="myfares:A+C"/>
										<DistanceMatrixElementRef version="any" ref="myfares:B+B"/>
										<DistanceMatrixElementRef version="any" ref="myfares:B+C"/>
										<DistanceMatrixElementRef version="any" ref="myfares:C+C"/>
									</distanceMatrixElements>
									<GenericParameterAssignment order="1" id="myfares:Nested_Zone@access" version="1.0">
										<TypeOfAccessRightAssignmentRef version="ntx:v1.0" ref="ntx:can_access"/>
										<ValidityParameterGroupingType>XOR</ValidityParameterGroupingType>
										<validityParameters>
											<NetworkRef version="any" ref="mybus:DTA"/>
										</validityParameters>
									</GenericParameterAssignment>
								</FareStructureElement>
								<FareStructureElement id="myfares:Nested_Zone@conditions_of_travel" version="1.0">
									<Name>eligible user types</Name>
									<GenericParameterAssignment version="1.0" order="1" id="myfares:Nested_Zone@conditions_of_travel">
										<Name>Conditions of travel</Name>
										<TypeOfAccessRightAssignmentRef version="ntx:v1.0" ref="ntx:condition_of_use"/>
										<LimitationGroupingType>AND</LimitationGroupingType>
										<limitations>
											<RoundTrip version="1.0" id="myfares:Nested_Zone@conditions_of_travel@direction">
												<Name>Single Trip</Name>
												<TripType>single</TripType>
											</RoundTrip>
											<FrequencyOfUse version="1.0" id="myfares:Nested_Zone@conditions_of_travel@frequency">
												<Name>One trip  </Name>
												<FrequencyOfUseType>single</FrequencyOfUseType>
												<MinimalFrequency>1</MinimalFrequency>
												<MaximalFrequency>1</MaximalFrequency>
											</FrequencyOfUse>
											<Interchanging version="1.0" id="myfares:Nested_Zone@conditions_of_travel@interchanging">
												<CanInterchange>true</CanInterchange>
												<CanBreakJourney>false</CanBreakJourney>
											</Interchanging>
											<UsageValidityPeriod version="any" id="myfares:Nested_Zone@conditions_of_travel@until">
												<Name>Valid untile ride complete</Name>
												<UsageEnd>endOfRide</UsageEnd>
											</UsageValidityPeriod>
										</limitations>
									</GenericParameterAssignment>
								</FareStructureElement>
							</fareStructureElements>
							<distanceMatrixElements>
								<DistanceMatrixElement version="any" id="myfares:A+A">
									<Name>Alpha to Alpha</Name>
									<StartTariffZoneRef version="any" ref="mybus:A"/>
									<EndTariffZoneRef version="any" ref="mybus:A"/>
									<structureFactors>
										<GeographicalStructureFactorRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:1zone"/>
									</structureFactors>
								</DistanceMatrixElement>
								<DistanceMatrixElement version="any" id="myfares:A+B">
									<Name>Alpha to Bravo</Name>
									<StartTariffZoneRef version="any" ref="mybus:A"/>
									<EndTariffZoneRef version="any" ref="mybus:B"/>
									<structureFactors>
										<GeographicalStructureFactorRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:2zone"/>
									</structureFactors>
								</DistanceMatrixElement>
								<DistanceMatrixElement version="any" id="myfares:A+C">
									<Name>Alpha to Charley</Name>
									<StartTariffZoneRef version="any" ref="mybus:A"/>
									<EndTariffZoneRef version="any" ref="mybus:C"/>
									<structureFactors>
										<GeographicalStructureFactorRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:3zone"/>
									</structureFactors>
								</DistanceMatrixElement>
								<DistanceMatrixElement version="any" id="myfares:B+B">
									<Name>Bravo to Charley</Name>
									<StartTariffZoneRef version="any" ref="mybus:B"/>
									<EndTariffZoneRef version="any" ref="mybus:B"/>
									<structureFactors>
										<GeographicalStructureFactorRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:1zone"/>
									</structureFactors>
								</DistanceMatrixElement>
								<DistanceMatrixElement version="any" id="myfares:B+C">
									<Name>Bravo to Charley</Name>
									<StartTariffZoneRef version="any" ref="mybus:B"/>
									<EndTariffZoneRef version="any" ref="mybus:C"/>
									<structureFactors>
										<GeographicalStructureFactorRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:2zone"/>
									</structureFactors>
								</DistanceMatrixElement>
								<DistanceMatrixElement version="any" id="myfares:C+C">
									<Name>Charley to Charley</Name>
									<StartTariffZoneRef version="any" ref="mybus:C"/>
									<EndTariffZoneRef version="any" ref="mybus:C"/>
									<structureFactors>
										<GeographicalStructureFactorRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:1zone"/>
									</structureFactors>
								</DistanceMatrixElement>
							</distanceMatrixElements>
							<!-- === PRICES ==== -->
							<priceGroups>
								<PriceGroupRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:DTA@Nested_Zone"/>
							</priceGroups>
						</Tariff>
					</tariffs>
					<!--- ====Fare Product======= -->
					<fareProducts>
						<PreassignedFareProduct version="1.0" id="myfares:Single_trip">
							<Name>Zone passes</Name>
							<TypeOfFareProductRef version="ntx:v1.0" ref="ntx:trip"/>
							<OperatorRef version="any" ref="mybus:DTA"/>
							<!--- ====VALIDABLE ELEMENTs====== -->
							<validableElements>
								<ValidableElement version="1.0" id="myfares:Single_trip@travel">
									<Name>Single  ride</Name>
									<fareStructureElements>
										<FareStructureElementRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:Nested_Zone@access"/>
										<FareStructureElementRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:Nested_Zone@conditions_of_travel"/>
									</fareStructureElements>
								</ValidableElement>
							</validableElements>
							<!--- ====ACCESS RIGHTs======= -->
							<accessRightsInProduct>
								<AccessRightInProduct version="1.0" id="myfares:Single_trip@travel" order="1">
									<Name>First ride</Name>
									<ValidableElementRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:Single_trip@travel"/>
								</AccessRightInProduct>
							</accessRightsInProduct>
						</PreassignedFareProduct>
						<!--- ===Cgild fares==== -->
					</fareProducts>
					<!--- ====Fare Prices======= -->
				</FareFrame>
				<FareFrame version="1.0" id="myfares:DTA@Nested_Zone@prices">
					<Name>Prices for unit zone </Name>
					<prerequisites>
						<FareFrameRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:DTA@Nested_Zone@products"/>
					</prerequisites>
					<!--- ====Pricing Parameters======= -->
					<PricingParameterSet version="any" id="myfares:DTA@Nested_Zone@pp">
						<PriceUnitRef version="any" ref="myfares:1Zone"/>
						<priceUnits>
							<PriceUnit version="any" id="myfares:1Zone">
								<Name>Arbitrary Quanitized Unit of Transport Usage -  </Name>
							</PriceUnit>
						</priceUnits>
					</PricingParameterSet>
					<priceGroups>
						<PriceGroup version="1.0" id="myfares:DTA@Nested_Zone">
							<Name>Unit fare zones</Name>
							<!--- ====Intervals======= -->
							<members>
								<GeographicalIntervalPrice version="1.0" id="myfares:Nested_Zone@gi_1">
									<Amount>1.00</Amount>
									<Units>1</Units>
									<GeographicalIntervalRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:gi_1zone"/>
								</GeographicalIntervalPrice>
								<GeographicalIntervalPrice version="1.0" id="myfares:Nested_Zone@gi_2">
									<Amount>1.50</Amount>
									<Units>2</Units>
									<GeographicalIntervalRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:gi_2zone"/>
								</GeographicalIntervalPrice>
								<GeographicalIntervalPrice version="1.0" id="myfares:Nested_Zone@gi_3">
									<Amount>3.00</Amount>
									<Units>3</Units>
									<GeographicalIntervalRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:gi_3zone"/>
								</GeographicalIntervalPrice>
							</members>
						</PriceGroup>
					</priceGroups>
				</FareFrame>
				<!--- ====RESOURCE FRAME===== -->
				<ResourceFrame version="1.0" id="mybus:DTA@Common_Resources">
					<codespaces>
						<Codespace id="ntx">
							<Xmlns>ntx</Xmlns>
							<XmlnsUrl>http://netex.org.uk/</XmlnsUrl>
							<Description>Netex built in value</Description>
						</Codespace>
					</codespaces>
					<typesOfValue>
						<ValueSet version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:Types_of_Tariff" classOfValues="TypeOfTariff">
							<Name>Types of Tariff</Name>
							<values>
								<!--- ====Types OfTariff ========= -->
								<TypeOfTariff version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:Distance_kilometers">
									<Name>Kilometer Distance Kilometers</Name>
								</TypeOfTariff>
								<TypeOfTariff version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:flat">
									<Name>Flat</Name>
								</TypeOfTariff>
								<TypeOfTariff version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:point_to_point">
									<Name>Point to point</Name>
								</TypeOfTariff>
								<TypeOfTariff version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:zone_to_zone">
									<Name>Zone to Zone</Name>
								</TypeOfTariff>
								<TypeOfTariff version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:zonal">
									<Name>Zonal</Name>
								</TypeOfTariff>
								<TypeOfTariff version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:unit_distance">
									<Name>Unit distance (count of stops, sections, zones)</Name>
								</TypeOfTariff>
								<TypeOfTariff version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:section">
									<Name>Section</Name>
								</TypeOfTariff>
								<TypeOfTariff version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:banded">
									<Name>Section</Name>
								</TypeOfTariff>
								<TypeOfTariff version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:stored_value">
									<Name>Stored value</Name>
								</TypeOfTariff>
								<TypeOfTariff version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:discount">
									<Name>Discount value</Name>
								</TypeOfTariff>
								<TypeOfTariff version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:multitrip">
									<Name>Multitrip carnet</Name>
								</TypeOfTariff>
								<TypeOfTariff version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:identity_card">
									<Name>SIdentity</Name>
								</TypeOfTariff>
							</values>
						</ValueSet>
						<ValueSet version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:Types_of_FareProduct" classOfValues="TypeOfFareProduct">
							<Name>Types of Fare Product</Name>
							<values>
								<TypeOfFareProduct version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:trip">
									<Name>Trip product</Name>
								</TypeOfFareProduct>
								<TypeOfFareProduct version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:multi_trip">
									<Name>Multitrip / carnet  product</Name>
								</TypeOfFareProduct>
								<TypeOfFareProduct version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:period_pass">
									<Name>Peroid pass product</Name>
								</TypeOfFareProduct>
								<TypeOfFareProduct version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:day_pass">
									<Name>Day pass product</Name>
								</TypeOfFareProduct>
								<TypeOfFareProduct version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:discount_card">
									<Name>Discount  product</Name>
								</TypeOfFareProduct>
							</values>
						</ValueSet>
						<ValueSet version="any" id="myfares:Types_of_Concession" classOfValues="TypeOfConcession">
							<Name>Types of concession</Name>
							<values>
								<!--- ====TypeOfConcession method========= -->
								<TypeOfConcession version="any" id="myfares:adult">
									<Name>Adult</Name>
								</TypeOfConcession>
								<TypeOfConcession version="any" id="myfares:child">
									<Name>Student</Name>
								</TypeOfConcession>
							</values>
						</ValueSet>
						<ValueSet version="any" id="myfares:Types_of_TravelDocument" classOfValues="TypeOfTravelDocument">
							<Name>Types of concession</Name>
							<values>
								<!--- ====TypeOfConcession method========= -->
								<TypeOfTravelDocument version="any" id="myfares:printed_ticket">
									<Name>Paper ticket</Name>
								</TypeOfTravelDocument>
								<TypeOfTravelDocument version="any" id="myfares:mobile_app">
									<Name>Mobile app</Name>
								</TypeOfTravelDocument>
							</values>
						</ValueSet>
						<ValueSet version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:Types_of_AccessRightAssignment" classOfValues="TypeOfAccessRightAssignment">
							<Name>Types of Access Right Assignment</Name>
							<values>
								<TypeOfAccessRightAssignment version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:eligible">
									<Name>Eligible for a product or discount</Name>
								</TypeOfAccessRightAssignment>
								<TypeOfAccessRightAssignment version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:can_access">
									<Name>Grants access rights to use or travel on</Name>
								</TypeOfAccessRightAssignment>
								<TypeOfAccessRightAssignment version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:condition_of_use">
									<Name>Defines a condition or restriction on use</Name>
								</TypeOfAccessRightAssignment>
							</values>
						</ValueSet>
					</typesOfValue>
					<organisations>
						<!--- =====Agency========= -->
						<Operator version="any" id="mybus:DTA">
							<Name>Demo Transit Authority</Name>
						</Operator>
					</organisations>
				</ResourceFrame>
			</frames>
		</CompositeFrame>
	</dataObjects>
</PublicationDelivery>

label: Bus TimeIntervalFares Zonal MultipleProduct
xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!-- ==== Simple Time Interval Fare   Example ====== 
This example shows the encoding of a time interval  tariff for a simple bus timetable for a zone in NeTex XML  
 
  There   is one  FARE PRODUCT, with differentoptions  for  one hour  , two hour  and all day use

Data is Fictional 

(C) CEN & Crown Copyright 2018, 2019 
Free to use under a Creative Commons license.

v1.1 Revised & corrected to use Tariff and simpler ids

===================================================
 
1. OVERVIEW
============

Fare Prices are defined in terms of   number of   time intervals elapsed

 There are access right sare to use    a single zone  , for one hour , two hours or all day

From 	To			 Price    
    p1	1 unit	1.00 EUR		 
    p2	2 unit	2.50 EUR		 
	p3	3 unit	3.00 EUR		 
	
==================================
2. DETAILS

There is a single  Tariff ZONE 1  for operator mybus:DTA
  
There is a TARIFF   myfares:Time_interval it has

      (a) Three TIME INTERVALS, each with a price
			1 Step: TIME INTERVAL: myfares:ti_1
		TIME INTERVALPRICE:  myfares:tip_1   1H 
			2 Steps: TIME INTERVAL: myfares:ti_2
		TIME INTERVALPRICE:  myfares:tip_2   2H UR
			3 Steps: TIME INTERVAL: myfares:ti_3
		TIME INTERVALPRICE:  myfares:tip_3   8H  


      (b) FARE STRUCTURE ELEMENTs  

		  (i) Access FARE STRUCTURE ELEMENTs for  scope - the TARIFF ZONE  @access

		  (ii) Access FARE STRUCTURE ELEMENTs for  TIME   INTERVALs Time_interval@access_when

	 	(iii) Conditions of Travel ARE STRUCTURE ELEMENT myfares:Time_interval@conditions_of_travel
 		FREQUENCY OF USE o  unlimited myfares:FrequencyOfUse:oneTrip
  	   INTERCHANGING unlimted

There is a SINGLE FARE PRODUCT   myfares:Period_pass 
    It has  a VALIDABLE ELEMENT to make a trip using the specified FARE STRUCTURE ELEMENTs

There are two SALE OFFER PACKAGES, one for printed ticket , one for a   mobile app, but the prices are the same  
    It has  a VALIDABLE ELEMENT to make a trip using the specified FARE STRUCTURE ELEMENTs
  
There are is a PRICE GROUP with three TIME  INTERVAL PRICes  , each with a price
 
			1 Step: TIME INTERVAL: myfares:ti_1   		TIME INTERVALPRICE:  myfares:tip_1   1H 
			2 Steps: TIME INTERVAL: myfares:ti_2   	TIME INTERVALPRICE:  myfares:tip_2   2H UR
			3 Steps: TIME INTERVAL: myfares:ti_3		TIME INTERVALPRICE:  myfares:tip_3   8H  


A COMPOSITE FRAME is used to group the component FRAMEs
 
   - It has a VALIDITY CONDITION  that specifies it is valid from Jan to June

		A SERVICE  FRAME is used to contain the STOP POINT  elements   LINE, etc
		A FARE FRAME is used to contain  the FARE  product   elements 
		A separate FARE FRAME is used to contain  the FARE  price   elements 
 		A RESOURCE is used to contain the TIME UNITs, etc
-->
<PublicationDelivery xmlns="http://www.netex.org.uk/netex" xmlns:siri="http://www.siri.org.uk/siri" xmlns:gml="http://www.opengis.net/gml/3.2" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" version="1.0" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.netex.org.uk/netex ../../../xsd/NeTEx_publication.xsd">
	<PublicationTimestamp>2010-12-17T09:30:47.0Z</PublicationTimestamp>
	<ParticipantRef>SYS001</ParticipantRef>
	<!--- ======WHAT WAS REQUESTED ========== -->
	<PublicationRequest version="1.0">
		<RequestTimestamp>2010-12-17T09:30:47.0Z</RequestTimestamp>
		<ParticipantRef>SYS002</ParticipantRef>
		<topics>
			<NetworkFrameTopic>
				<selectionValidityConditions>
					<AvailabilityCondition version="any" id="hde:range">
						<FromDate>2011-01-01T00:00:00Z</FromDate>
					</AvailabilityCondition>
				</selectionValidityConditions>
				<FareFrameRef ref="myfares:any">REQUEST</FareFrameRef>
			</NetworkFrameTopic>
		</topics>
	</PublicationRequest>
	<PublicationRefreshInterval>P1M</PublicationRefreshInterval>
	<Description>Example  of simple point to point fares</Description>
	<!--- =============== RESULTS =========== -->
	<dataObjects>
		<CompositeFrame version="1.0" id="myfares:DTA@Time_Interval">
			<validityConditions>
				<ValidBetween>
					<FromDate>2011-01-01T00:00:00Z</FromDate>
					<ToDate>2011-07-01T00:00:00Z</ToDate>
				</ValidBetween>
			</validityConditions>
			<!--- ======= CODESPACEs======== -->
			<codespaces>
				<Codespace id="mybus">
					<Xmlns>mybus</Xmlns>
					<XmlnsUrl>http://www.mybuses.eu/stuff</XmlnsUrl>
					<Description>My buses</Description>
				</Codespace>
				<Codespace id="myfares">
					<Xmlns>myfares</Xmlns>
					<XmlnsUrl>http://www.myfares,com/fares</XmlnsUrl>
					<Description>Fare data</Description>
				</Codespace>
			</codespaces>
			<!--- =======FRAME DEFAULTS======== -->
			<FrameDefaults>
				<DefaultCodespaceRef ref="myfares"/>
				<DefaultCurrency>EUR</DefaultCurrency>
			</FrameDefaults>
			<frames>
				<ServiceFrame version="1.0" id="mybus:DTA@Time_Interval@network">
					<Name>Fares  for Winter timetable for Network</Name>
					<prerequisites>
						<ResourceFrameRef version="1.0" ref="mybus:DTA@Common_Resources"/>
					</prerequisites>
					<!--- =========LINEs=========== -->
					<Network version="any" id="mybus:DTA">
						<OperatorRef version="any" ref="mybus:DTA"/>
						<tariffZones>
							<TariffZoneRef version="any" ref="myfares:1"/>
						</tariffZones>
					</Network>
					<tariffZones>
						<!--- ====TARIFF ZONEs ======== -->
						<TariffZone version="any" id="myfares:1">
							<Name>Zone 1</Name>
						</TariffZone>
					</tariffZones>
				</ServiceFrame>
				<!--- =============== FAREs =========== -->
				<FareFrame version="1.0" id="myfares:DTA@Time_Interval@products">
					<prerequisites>
						<ServiceFrameRef version="1.0" ref="mybus:DTA@Time_Interval@network"/>
					</prerequisites>
					<!--- ====Fare Structure======= -->
					<timeUnits>
						<!--- ====TimeU nit======== -->
						<TimeUnit version="1.0" id="myfares:1hour">
							<Name>Time unit of 1 hour</Name>
						</TimeUnit>
					</timeUnits>
					<tariffs>
						<Tariff version="1.0" id="myfares:Time_interval">
							<Name>Zonal Fare</Name>
							<OperatorRef version="any" ref="mybus:DTA"/>
							<TypeOfTariffRef version="ntx:v1.0" ref="ntx:zonal"/>
							<TimeUnitRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:1hour"/>
							<timeIntervals>
								<TimeInterval version="1.0" id="myfares:1hour">
									<Name>One Hour</Name>
									<Duration>PT1H</Duration>
									<timeStructureFactors>
										<TimeStructureFactor version="1.0" id="myfares:tsf_1h">
											<Name>One hour's  use</Name>
											<Factor>1</Factor>
											<TimeUnitRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:1hour"/>
										</TimeStructureFactor>
									</timeStructureFactors>
								</TimeInterval>
								<TimeInterval version="1.0" id="myfares:2hour">
									<Name>Two Hours</Name>
									<Duration>PT2H</Duration>
									<timeStructureFactors>
										<TimeStructureFactor version="1.0" id="myfares:tsf_2h">
											<Name>Two hour's  use</Name>
											<Factor>2</Factor>
											<TimeUnitRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:1hour"/>
										</TimeStructureFactor>
									</timeStructureFactors>
								</TimeInterval>
								<TimeInterval version="1.0" id="myfares:1day">
									<Name>All Day Use on day of purchase</Name>
									<StartTime>06:00:00</StartTime>
									<EndTime>02:00:00</EndTime>
									<DayOffset>1</DayOffset>
									<timeStructureFactors>
										<TimeStructureFactor version="1.0" id="myfares:tsf_day">
											<Name>All day use on day of purchase</Name>
											<Factor>24</Factor>
											<TimeUnitRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:1hour"/>
										</TimeStructureFactor>
									</timeStructureFactors>
								</TimeInterval>
							</timeIntervals>
							<fareStructureElements>
								<FareStructureElement version="1.0" id="myfares:Time_interval@access">
									<GenericParameterAssignment order="1" id="myfares:Time_interval@access" version="1.0">
										<TypeOfAccessRightAssignmentRef versionRef="fxc:v1.0" ref="fxc:can_access"/>
										<ValidityParameterGroupingType>XOR</ValidityParameterGroupingType>
										<validityParameters>
											<TariffZoneRef version="any" ref="myfares:1"/>
										</validityParameters>
									</GenericParameterAssignment>
								</FareStructureElement>
								<FareStructureElement version="1.0" id="myfares:Time_interval@access_when">
									<Name>Allowed periods for  use of a  zone</Name>
									<timeStructureFactors>
										<TimeStructureFactorRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:tsf_1h"/>
										<TimeStructureFactorRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:tsf_2h"/>
										<TimeStructureFactorRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:tsf_day"/>
									</timeStructureFactors>
									<GenericParameterAssignment order="1" id="myfares:Time_interval@access_when" version="1.0">
										<TypeOfAccessRightAssignmentRef versionRef="fxc:v1.0" ref="fxc:can_access_when"/>
										<ValidityParameterGroupingType>XOR</ValidityParameterGroupingType>
									</GenericParameterAssignment>
								</FareStructureElement>
								<FareStructureElement id="myfares:Time_interval@conditions_of_travel" version="1.0">
									<Name>Conditions of travel</Name>
									<GenericParameterAssignment version="1.0" order="1" id="myfares:Time_interval@conditions_of_travel">
										<Name>Conditions of travel</Name>
										<TypeOfAccessRightAssignmentRef versionRef="fxc:v1.0" ref="fxc:condition_of_use"/>
										<LimitationGroupingType>AND</LimitationGroupingType>
										<limitations>
											<FrequencyOfUse version="1.0" id="myfares:Time_interval@conditions_of_travel@frequency">
												<FrequencyOfUseType>unlimited</FrequencyOfUseType>
											</FrequencyOfUse>
											<Interchanging version="1.0" id="myfares:Time_interval@conditions_of_travel@interchanging">
												<CanInterchange>true</CanInterchange>
												<CanBreakJourney>true</CanBreakJourney>
											</Interchanging>
										</limitations>
									</GenericParameterAssignment>
								</FareStructureElement>
							</fareStructureElements>
							<priceGroups>
								<PriceGroupRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:DTA@Time_interval"/>
							</priceGroups>
						</Tariff>
					</tariffs>
					<!--- ====Fare Product======= -->
					<fareProducts>
						<PreassignedFareProduct version="1.0" id="myfares:Period_pass">
							<Name>1 zone use for specified period</Name>
							<TypeOfFareProductRef version="ntx:v1.0" ref="ntx:period_pass"/>
							<OperatorRef version="any" ref="mybus:DTA"/>
							<validableElements>
								<ValidableElement version="1.0" id="myfares:Period_pass@travel">
									<fareStructureElements>

					</salesOfferPackages>
				</FareFrame>
				<!--- =============== FAREs =========== -->

label: Bus ZonalFares MultipleSalesPackages
xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!-- ==== SImple Timetable  Example ====== 
This example shows the encoding of a Zonal fare set for a   bus timetable  in NeTex XML   
 
This example shows the encoding of  separate pricing for  a number of Zone based fares for different periods
  
There are day, weekly and annual fares, and also  special student fares  geared to the student terms

There are both mobile and smartcard   sales packages

There are additional prices fro promo and  funding basis

The prices are presented in a flat form compatible with a legacy export

Data is based on an example 

(C) CEN & Crown Copyright 2018, 2019 
Free to use under a Creative Commons license.

v1.1 Revised & corrected to use Tariff and simpler ids

===================================================

1. OVERVIEW
============

 There  are three  FARE PRODUCTs , 
	
    standard period  pass for 1 day, 1 week 14 week or 1 year 
    day family;  a group ticket
    student:  for acdemic term, 15 week or year   . Only valid in certain areas
 
The student products have a USER PROFILEs
   

There are five  SALES OFFER PACKAGEs - one for every product as a mobile  product.  Adult Monthly and annual passes are also available as travel cards
 
There are different price paarneters for each combination found 
   
 There are some group zones
		 
			day  		week	  4 week    	year    term academic_year  15 week
Midlands  		0.50			0.40				0.40				0.30 

==================================
2. DETAILS

There are a number of TARIFF ZONEs, grouped within two main zones

There are three separate TARIFFs  , one for the standard product, one for the family product and one for teh student product 
     
  I. Standard Tariff   

    There is a  cdla:Time_interval@standard

    (a) TIME INTERVALS Four different  cdla:1day, cdla:1week, cdla:4week, cdla:1year 

      (b) FARE STRUCTURE ELEMENTs  

		  (i) Access FARE STRUCTURE ELEMENTs for  scope - the TARIFF ZONE  @access
				 use of the Network

		  (ii) Access when FARE STRUCTURE ELEMENTs for  TIME   INTERVALs standard@access_when
					 Any one of cdla:1day, cdla:1week, cdla:4week, cdla:1year 

		  (iii) Eligibility FARE STRUCTURE ELEMENTs for  USER PROFILEs  standard@eligibility
						adult & Child 

	 	(iv) Conditions of Travel ARE STRUCTURE ELEMENT   standard@conditions_of_travel
				FREQUENCY OF USE    unlimited myfares:Frequency 
			   INTERCHANGING unlimted


  II. Family Tariff   

    There is a  cdla:Time_interval@family TARIFF

    (a) TIME INTERVALS    -  only   cdla:1day", 
      (b) FARE STRUCTURE ELEMENTs  

		  (i) Access FARE STRUCTURE ELEMENTs for  scope - the TARIFF ZONE  family@access
				 use of the Network

		  (ii) Access when FARE STRUCTURE ELEMENTs for  TIME   INTERVALs family@access_when
				1d ay only

		  (iii) Eligibility FARE STRUCTURE ELEMENTs for  USER PROFILEs  family@eligibility
								GROUP TICKET  family

	 	(iv) Conditions of Travel ARE STRUCTURE ELEMENT  family@conditions_of_travel
				FREQUENCY OF USE o  unlimited myfares:Frequency  
			   INTERCHANGING unlimted


  II. Student Tariff   

    There is a  cdla:Time_interval@student TARIFF

    (a) TIME INTERVALS 
				  cdla:1day, cdla:1week, cdla:4week, cdla:1year 
				academic_year;   academic_term@autumn,  academic_term@spring,  academic_term@summer, 
				

    (b) FARE QUALITY FACTORS are used for two different purposes
              (a) different prices for different funding subsidy categories  
				(b) promotional prices  

      (c) FARE STRUCTURE ELEMENTs  

		  (i) Access FARE STRUCTURE ELEMENTs for  scope - the TARIFF ZONEstudent@access
				 limited to specifc zones

		  (ii) Access when FARE STRUCTURE ELEMENTs for  TIME   INTERVALs ZONEstudent@access_when
				1Any one of cdla:1day, cdla:1week, cdla:4week, cdla:1year 
					   or academic_term,  academic_year

		  (iii) Eligibility FARE STRUCTURE ELEMENTs for  USER PROFILEs  ZONEstudent@eligibility
								USER PROFILE student

	 	(iv) Conditions of Travel ARE STRUCTURE ELEMENT  family@conditions_of_travel
				FREQUENCY OF USE    unlimited myfares:Frequency 
			   INTERCHANGING unlimited

There is a  separate  FARE PRODUCT   for each Tariff myfares:Period_pass 
    Each has  a VALIDABLE ELEMENT to make a trip using the specified FARE STRUCTURE ELEMENTs


For the Standard product  there are two   SALEs OFFER PACKAGs
    A m-ticket for all TIME INTERVALS
    A smart card for teh monthly and annual IME INTERVALS
 
Tor the family product, there is a SiIngle  SALEs OFFER PACKAGE , mobile for a day ticket 

For the  student product
    There are two SALE OFFER PACKAGES,  ,     There are PURCHASE WINDOW conditions on when the tickets can be bought
		A m-ticket for all TIME INTERVALS
		A smart card for teh monthly and annual TIME INTERVALS
 

	FARE PRICEs  The prices are presented as flat cells in a FARE TABLE - each cell indycates its combination of factors

  There is a USAGE PARAMETER PRICE for exach combination of 
	FARE PRODUCT  + DISTANCE MATRIX ELEMENT  + 	USER PROFILE  +  USAGE VALIDITY PERIOD

		  for example
		USAGE PARAMETER PRICE 		 cdla:Cannock@adult@day">
									AMOUNT 3.80</Amount>
									USAGE VALIDITY PERIOD: cdla:1day 
									USER PROFILE cdla:adult 
										FARE PRODUCT cdla:zonal 
									 DISTANCE MATRIX ELEMENT  cdla:Cannock 
					 
 
		A COMPOSITE FRAME is used to group the component FRAMEs
   
		A SERVICE  FRAME is used to contain the TARIFF ZONEs
		Three FARE FRAMES ARE used to contain  the FARE    elements  
			 Srandard, family and student
             
		A separate FARE FRAME is used to contain  the FARE    prices 
 		A RESOURCE is used to contain the TYPE OF CONCESSION, OPERATOR etc 
-->
<PublicationDelivery xmlns="http://www.netex.org.uk/netex" xmlns:siri="http://www.siri.org.uk/siri" xmlns:gml="http://www.opengis.net/gml/3.2" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" version="1.0" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.netex.org.uk/netex ../../../xsd/NeTEx_publication.xsd">
	<PublicationTimestamp>2010-12-17T09:30:47.0Z</PublicationTimestamp>

								<TariffZoneRef version="any" ref="cdla:Tamworth"/>
								<TariffZoneRef version="any" ref="cdla:Telford"/>
