label: Metro FlatFare GroupProduct
xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!-- ==== SImple Timetable  Example ====== 
This example shows the encoding of a flat   fare set for w ith a group ticket in NeTex XML  
 
Uses Flat fares   There  are thre  FARE PRODUCT ,: Standard  (one way and return)  and Group Ticket (one way)
 
 
1. OVERVIEW
============
There is  a flat fare to use the network of OPERATOR DTA 

 Fare type									 Single Price    	Return
  Standard fare 							1.00 EUR		 	1.75
   Group Tickeet 10 or more people 75% discount  n/a	
==================================
2. DETAILS

There is one OPERATOR  :  mybus:DTA

There are Three   FARE PRODUCTs

	 Standard: PREASSIGNED FARE PRODUCT myfares:flat_standard_single  
		VALIDITY PARAMETER ASSIGNMENTs
			OPERATOR mybus:DTA
		FARE USAGE PARAMETERs
			FREQUENCY OF USE   one trip  unlimited  myfares:FrequencyOfUse:return 

	 Standard: PREASSIGNED FARE PRODUCT myfares:flat_standard_return
		VALIDITY PARAMETER ASSIGNMENTs
			OPERATOR mybus:DTA
		FARE USAGE PARAMETERs 
			FREQUENCY OF USE   one trip  unlimited  myfares:FrequencyOfUse:return 

	Group PREASSIGNED FARE PRODUCT myfares:flat_group
		VALIDITY PARAMETER ASSIGNMENTs
			OPERATOR mybus:DTA
		FARE USAGE PARAMETERs
			FREQUENCY OF USE   one trip  unlimited  myfares:FrequencyOfUse:return 
			GROUP TICKET - 10 or more  myfares:GroupTicketRef:group
 
	Prices 
		FARE PRODUCT PRICE : myfares:standard   1.00 EUR
		FARE PRODUCT PRICE : myfares:return  1.75 EUR
								 
		USAGE PARAMETER   PRICE :myfares:group"> 75%
									 

A COMPOSITE FRAME is used to group the component FRAMEs
 
   - It has a VALIDITY CONDITION  that specifies it is valid from Jan to June

		A SERVICE  FRAME is used to contain the STOP POINT  elements   LINE, etc
		A FARE FRAME is used to contain  the FARE    elements 
 		A RESOURCE is used to contain the OPERATORs, etc
-->
<PublicationDelivery xmlns="http://www.netex.org.uk/netex" xmlns:siri="http://www.siri.org.uk/siri" xmlns:gml="http://www.opengis.net/gml/3.2" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" version="1.0" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.netex.org.uk/netex ../../../xsd/NeTEx_publication.xsd">
	<PublicationTimestamp>2010-12-17T09:30:47.0Z</PublicationTimestamp>
	<ParticipantRef>SYS001</ParticipantRef>
	<!--- ======WHAT WAS REQUESTED ========== -->
	<PublicationRequest version="1.0">
		<RequestTimestamp>2010-12-17T09:30:47.0Z</RequestTimestamp>
		<ParticipantRef>SYS002</ParticipantRef>
		<topics>
			<NetworkFrameTopic>
				<selectionValidityConditions>
					<AvailabilityCondition version="any" id="mybus:range">
						<FromDate>2011-01-01T00:00:00Z</FromDate>
					</AvailabilityCondition>
				</selectionValidityConditions>
				<FareFrameRef ref="myfares:any">REQUEST</FareFrameRef>
			</NetworkFrameTopic>
		</topics>
	</PublicationRequest>
	<PublicationRefreshInterval>P1M</PublicationRefreshInterval>
	<Description>Example  of simple point to point fares</Description>
	<!--- =============== RESULTS =========== -->
	<dataObjects>
		<CompositeFrame version="1" id="myfares:DTA@Flat">
			<validityConditions>
				<ValidBetween>
					<FromDate>2011-01-01T00:00:00Z</FromDate>
					<ToDate>2011-07-01T00:00:00Z</ToDate>
				</ValidBetween>
			</validityConditions>
			<!--- ======= CODESPACEs======== -->
			<codespaces>
				<Codespace id="mybus">
					<Xmlns>mybus</Xmlns>
					<XmlnsUrl>http://www.mybuses.eu/stuff</XmlnsUrl>
					<Description>My buses</Description>
				</Codespace>
				<Codespace id="myfares">
					<Xmlns>myfares</Xmlns>
					<XmlnsUrl>http://www.myfares,com/fares</XmlnsUrl>
					<Description>Fare data</Description>
				</Codespace>
			</codespaces>
			<!--- =======FRAME DEFAULTS======== -->
			<FrameDefaults>
				<DefaultCodespaceRef ref="myfares"/>
				<DefaultCurrency>EUR</DefaultCurrency>
			</FrameDefaults>
			<frames>
				<!--- =============== FAREs =========== -->
				<FareFrame version="1.0" id="myfares:DTA@Flat@products">
					<prerequisites>
						<ResourceFrameRef version="1.0" ref="mybus:DTA@Common_Resources"/>
					</prerequisites>
					<!--- ====Fare Structure======= -->
					<tariffs>
						<Tariff version="1.0" id="myfares:Flat">
							<Name>Flat  tariff</Name>
							<OperatorRef version="any" ref="mybus:DTA"/>
							<TypeOfTariffRef version="ntx:v1.0" ref="ntx:flat"/>
							<fareStructureElements>
								<FareStructureElement version="1.0" id="myfares:Flat@access">
									<GenericParameterAssignment id="myfares:Flat@access-1" version="1.0">
										<TypeOfAccessRightAssignmentRef version="ntx:v1.0" ref="ntx:can_access"/>
										<ValidityParameterGroupingType>XOR</ValidityParameterGroupingType>
										<validityParameters>
											<VehicleModes>metro</VehicleModes>
											<OperatorRef version="any" ref="mybus:DTA"/>
										</validityParameters>
									</GenericParameterAssignment>
								</FareStructureElement>
								<FareStructureElement version="1.0" id="myfares:Flat@eligibility">
									<Name>Eligible user types</Name>
									<GenericParameterAssignment id="myfares:Flat@eligibility-1" version="1.0">
										<TypeOfAccessRightAssignmentRef version="ntx:v1.0" ref="ntx:eligible"/>
										<LimitationGroupingType>XOR</LimitationGroupingType>
										<limitations>
											<!--- ===ELIGIBILITY USAGE PARAMETERS ========= -->
											<UserProfile version="any" id="myfares:adult">
												<Name>Child Fare</Name>
												<MinimumAge>17</MinimumAge>
											</UserProfile>
											<UserProfile version="any" id="myfares:child">
												<Name>Child Fare</Name>
												<MaximumAge>16</MaximumAge>
											</UserProfile>
											<GroupTicket version="any" id="myfares:group">
												<Name>Group Fare - 10 or more people</Name>
												<MinimumNumberOfPersons>10</MinimumNumberOfPersons>
											</GroupTicket>
										</limitations>
									</GenericParameterAssignment>
								</FareStructureElement>
								<FareStructureElement id="myfares:Flat@conditions_of_travel@single" version="1.0">
									<Name>Conditions of travel</Name>
									<GenericParameterAssignment version="1.0" id="myfares:Flat@conditions_of_travel@single-1">
										<Name>Conditions of travel</Name>
										<TypeOfAccessRightAssignmentRef version="ntx:v1.0" ref="ntx:condition_of_use"/>
										<LimitationGroupingType>AND</LimitationGroupingType>
										<limitations>
											<RoundTrip version="any" id="myfares:Flat@conditions_of_travel@single@trip">
												<Name>Single</Name>
												<TripType>single</TripType>
											</RoundTrip>
											<FrequencyOfUse version="1.0" id="myfares:Flat@conditions_of_travel@single@frequency">
												<FrequencyOfUseType>single</FrequencyOfUseType>
												<MaximalFrequency>1</MaximalFrequency>
											</FrequencyOfUse>
											<Interchanging version="1.0" id="myfares:Flat@conditions_of_travel@single@interchanging">
												<CanInterchange>true</CanInterchange>
												<FromMode>metro</FromMode>
												<ToMode>metro</ToMode>
												<CanBreakJourney>false</CanBreakJourney>
											</Interchanging>
										</limitations>
									</GenericParameterAssignment>
								</FareStructureElement>
								<FareStructureElement id="myfares:Flat@conditions_of_travel@outbound" version="1.0">
									<Name>Conditions of travel</Name>
									<GenericParameterAssignment version="1.0" id="myfares:Flat@conditions_of_travel@outbound-1">
										<Name>Conditions of travel</Name>
										<TypeOfAccessRightAssignmentRef version="ntx:v1.0" ref="ntx:condition_of_use"/>
										<LimitationGroupingType>AND</LimitationGroupingType>
										<limitations>
											<RoundTrip version="any" id="myfares:Flat@conditions_of_travel@outbound@trip">
												<Name>Outbound</Name>
												<TripType>single</TripType>
											</RoundTrip>
											<FrequencyOfUse version="1.0" id="myfares:Flat@conditions_of_travel@outbound@frequency">
												<FrequencyOfUseType>single</FrequencyOfUseType>
												<MaximalFrequency>1</MaximalFrequency>
											</FrequencyOfUse>
											<Interchanging version="1.0" id="myfares:Flat@conditions_of_travel@outbound@interchanging">
												<CanInterchange>true</CanInterchange>
												<CanBreakJourney>false</CanBreakJourney>
											</Interchanging>
										</limitations>
									</GenericParameterAssignment>
								</FareStructureElement>
								<FareStructureElement id="myfares:Flat@conditions_of_travel@inbound" version="1.0">
									<Name>Conditions of travel</Name>
									<GenericParameterAssignment version="1.0" id="myfares:Flat@conditions_of_travel@inbound-1">
										<Name>Conditions of travel</Name>
										<TypeOfAccessRightAssignmentRef version="ntx:v1.0" ref="ntx:condition_of_use"/>
										<LimitationGroupingType>AND</LimitationGroupingType>
										<limitations>
											<RoundTrip version="any" id="myfares:Flat@conditions_of_travel@inbound@trip">
												<Name>Return</Name>
												<TripType>returnOnly</TripType>
											</RoundTrip>
											<FrequencyOfUse version="1.0" id="myfares:Flat@conditions_of_travel@inbound@frequency">
												<FrequencyOfUseType>single</FrequencyOfUseType>
												<MaximalFrequency>1</MaximalFrequency>
											</FrequencyOfUse>
											<Interchanging version="1.0" id="myfares:Flat@conditions_of_travel@inbound@interchanging">
												<CanInterchange>true</CanInterchange>
												<CanBreakJourney>false</CanBreakJourney>
											</Interchanging>
										</limitations>
									</GenericParameterAssignment>
								</FareStructureElement>
							</fareStructureElements>
							<!-- === PRICES ==== -->
							<priceGroups>
								<PriceGroupRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:Flat"/>
							</priceGroups>
						</Tariff>
					</tariffs>
					<!--- ====Fare Product======= -->
					<fareProducts>
						<PreassignedFareProduct version="1.0" id="myfares:Single_trip">
							<Name>Adult  Standard Flat  fare  - One way </Name>
							<TypeOfFareProductRef version="ntx:v1.0" ref="ntx:trip"/>
							<OperatorRef version="any" ref="mybus:DTA"/>
							<!--- ====VALIDABLE ELEMENTs====== -->
							<validableElements>
								<ValidableElement version="1.0" id="myfares:Single_trip@travel">
									<Name>A metro Trip</Name>
									<fareStructureElements>
										<FareStructureElementRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:Flat@access"/>
										<FareStructureElementRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:Flat@eligibility"/>
										<FareStructureElementRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:Flat@conditions_of_travel@single"/>
									</fareStructureElements>
								</ValidableElement>
							</validableElements>
							<!--- ====ACCESS RIGHTs======= -->
							<accessRightsInProduct>
								<AccessRightInProduct version="1.0" id="myfares:Single_trip@travel-1">
									<Name>First ride</Name>
									<IsFirstInSequence>true</IsFirstInSequence>
									<IsLastInSequence>true</IsLastInSequence>
									<ValidableElementRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:Single_trip@travel"/>
								</AccessRightInProduct>
							</accessRightsInProduct>
						</PreassignedFareProduct>
						<PreassignedFareProduct version="1.0" id="myfares:Return_trip">
							<Name>Adult  Standard Flat  fare  - One way </Name>
							<TypeOfFareProductRef version="ntx:v1.0" ref="ntx:trip"/>
							<OperatorRef version="any" ref="mybus:DTA"/>
							<!--- ====VALIDABLE ELEMENTs====== -->
							<validableElements>
								<ValidableElement version="1.0" id="myfares:Return_trip@travel@outbound">
									<Name>Outbound  metro Trip</Name>
									<fareStructureElements>
										<FareStructureElementRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:Flat@access"/>
										<FareStructureElementRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:Flat@eligibility"/>
										<FareStructureElementRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:Flat@conditions_of_travel@outbound"/>
									</fareStructureElements>
								</ValidableElement>
								<ValidableElement version="1.0" id="myfares:Return_trip@travel@inbound">
									<Name>Return metro Trip</Name>
									<fareStructureElements>
										<FareStructureElementRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:Flat@access"/>
										<FareStructureElementRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:Flat@eligibility"/>
										<FareStructureElementRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:Flat@conditions_of_travel@inbound"/>
									</fareStructureElements>
								</ValidableElement>
							</validableElements>
							<!--- ====ACCESS RIGHTs======= -->
							<accessRightsInProduct>
								<AccessRightInProduct version="1.0" id="myfares:Return_trip@travel-1">
									<Name>Outbound  trip</Name>
									<IsFirstInSequence>false</IsFirstInSequence>
									<IsLastInSequence>true</IsLastInSequence>
									<ValidableElementRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:Return_trip@travel@outbound"/>
								</AccessRightInProduct>
								<AccessRightInProduct version="1.0" id="myfares:Return_trip@travel-2">
									<Name>Return tripe</Name>
									<IsFirstInSequence>false</IsFirstInSequence>
									<IsLastInSequence>true</IsLastInSequence>
									<ValidableElementRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:Return_trip@travel@inbound"/>
								</AccessRightInProduct>
							</accessRightsInProduct>
						</PreassignedFareProduct>
					</fareProducts>
					<!--- ====Sales Packages ====== -->
					<salesOfferPackages>
						<SalesOfferPackage version="1.0" id="myfares:Single_trip-SOP@p-ticket@individual">
							<Name>Individual Single, Paper Ticket </Name>
							<validityParameterAssignments>
								<GenericParameterAssignment id="myfares:Single_trip-SOP@p-ticket@individual-1" version="1.0">
									<TypeOfAccessRightAssignmentRef version="ntx:v1.0" ref="ntx:eligible"/>
									<LimitationGroupingType>XOR</LimitationGroupingType>
									<limitations>
										<!--- ===ELIGIBILITY USAGE PARAMETERS ========= -->
										<UserProfileRef version="any" ref="myfares:adult"/>
										<UserProfileRef version="any" ref="myfares:child"/>
									</limitations>
								</GenericParameterAssignment>
							</validityParameterAssignments>
							<salesOfferPackageElements>
								<SalesOfferPackageElement id="myfares:Single_trip-SOP@p-ticket@individual-1" version="1.0">
									<TypeOfTravelDocumentRef version="any" ref="myfares:paper_ticket"/>
									<FareProductRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:Single_trip"/>
								</SalesOfferPackageElement>
							</salesOfferPackageElements>
						</SalesOfferPackage>
						<SalesOfferPackage version="1.0" id="myfares:Return_trip-SOP@p-ticket@individual">
							<Name>Individual Return, Paper Ticket </Name>
							<validityParameterAssignments>
								<GenericParameterAssignment id="myfares:Return_trip-SOP@p-ticket@individual-1" version="1.0">
									<TypeOfAccessRightAssignmentRef version="ntx:v1.0" ref="ntx:eligible"/>
									<LimitationGroupingType>XOR</LimitationGroupingType>
									<limitations>
										<!--- ===ELIGIBILITY USAGE PARAMETERS ========= -->
										<UserProfileRef version="any" ref="myfares:adult"/>
										<UserProfileRef version="any" ref="myfares:child"/>
									</limitations>
								</GenericParameterAssignment>
							</validityParameterAssignments>
							<salesOfferPackageElements>
								<SalesOfferPackageElement id="myfares:Return_trip-SOP@p-ticket@individual-1" version="1.0">
									<TypeOfTravelDocumentRef version="any" ref="myfares:paper_ticket"/>
									<FareProductRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:Return_trip"/>
								</SalesOfferPackageElement>
							</salesOfferPackageElements>
						</SalesOfferPackage>
						<SalesOfferPackage version="1.0" id="myfares:Single_trip-SOP@p-ticket@group">
							<Name>Group Single, Paper Ticket </Name>
							<validityParameterAssignments>
								<GenericParameterAssignment id="myfares:Single_trip-SOP@p-ticket@group-1" version="1.0">
									<TypeOfAccessRightAssignmentRef version="ntx:v1.0" ref="ntx:eligible"/>
									<LimitationGroupingType>XOR</LimitationGroupingType>
									<limitations>
										<!--- ===ELIGIBILITY USAGE PARAMETERS ========= -->
										<GroupTicketRef version="any" ref="myfares:group"/>
									</limitations>
								</GenericParameterAssignment>
							</validityParameterAssignments>
							<salesOfferPackageElements>
								<SalesOfferPackageElement id="myfares:Single_trip-SOP@p-tickett@group-1" version="1.0">
									<TypeOfTravelDocumentRef version="any" ref="myfares:paper_ticket"/>
									<FareProductRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:Single_trip"/>
								</SalesOfferPackageElement>
							</salesOfferPackageElements>
						</SalesOfferPackage>
						<SalesOfferPackage version="1.0" id="myfares:Return_trip-SOP@p-ticket@group">
							<Name>Group Return , Paper Ticket </Name>
							<validityParameterAssignments>
								<GenericParameterAssignment id="myfares:Return_trip-SOP@p-ticket@group-1" version="1.0">
									<TypeOfAccessRightAssignmentRef version="ntx:v1.0" ref="ntx:eligible"/>
									<LimitationGroupingType>XOR</LimitationGroupingType>
									<limitations>
										<!--- ===ELIGIBILITY USAGE PARAMETERS ========= -->
										<GroupTicketRef version="any" ref="myfares:group"/>
									</limitations>
								</GenericParameterAssignment>
							</validityParameterAssignments>
							<salesOfferPackageElements>
								<SalesOfferPackageElement id="myfares:Return_trip-SOP@p-ticket@group-1" version="1.0">
									<TypeOfTravelDocumentRef version="any" ref="myfares:paper_ticket"/>
									<FareProductRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:Return_trip"/>
								</SalesOfferPackageElement>
							</salesOfferPackageElements>
						</SalesOfferPackage>
					</salesOfferPackages>
				</FareFrame>
				<!--- ====Fare Prices======= -->
				<FarePriceFrame version="1.0" id="myfares:DTA@Flat@prices">
					<prerequisites>
						<FareFrameRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:DTA@Flat@products"/>
					</prerequisites>
					<!--- ====Pricing Parmaters======= -->
					<PricingParameterSet version="1.0" id="myfares:Flat@prices">
						<pricingRules>
							<DiscountingRule version="any" id="myfares:group_discount">
								<DiscountAsPercentage>75</DiscountAsPercentage>
							</DiscountingRule>
						</pricingRules>
					</PricingParameterSet>
					<priceGroups>
						<PriceGroup version="1.0" id="myfares:Flat">
							<Name>Prices for Flat  Fare Products</Name>
							<members>
								<SalesOfferPackagePrice version="1.0" id="myfares:Single_trip-SOP@p-ticket@individual">
									<Name>Return fare</Name>
									<Amount>1.00</Amount>
									<Currency>EUR</Currency>
									<SalesOfferPackageRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:Single_trip-SOP@p-ticket@individual"/>
								</SalesOfferPackagePrice>
								<SalesOfferPackagePrice version="1.0" id="myfares:Return_trip-SOP@p-ticket@individual">
									<Name>Single fare</Name>
									<Amount>1.75</Amount>
									<Currency>EUR</Currency>
									<SalesOfferPackageRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:Return_trip-SOP@p-ticket@individual"/>
								</SalesOfferPackagePrice>
								<SalesOfferPackagePrice version="1.0" id="Single_trip-SOP@p-ticket@group">
									<Name>Group discount - all fares</Name>
									<SalesOfferPackagePriceRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:Single_trip-SOP@p-ticket@individual"/>
									<DiscountingRuleRef version="any" ref="myfares:group_discount"/>
									<SalesOfferPackageRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:Single_trip-SOP@p-ticket@group"/>
								</SalesOfferPackagePrice>
								<SalesOfferPackagePrice version="1.0" id="Return_trip-SOP@p-ticket@group">
									<Name>Group discount - all fares</Name>
									<SalesOfferPackagePriceRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:Return_trip-SOP@p-ticket@individual"/>
									<DiscountingRuleRef version="any" ref="myfares:group_discount"/>
									<SalesOfferPackageRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:Return_trip-SOP@p-ticket@group"/>
								</SalesOfferPackagePrice>
							</members>
						</PriceGroup>
					</priceGroups>
				</FarePriceFrame>
				<!--- ===========RESOURCEs========== -->
				<ResourceFrame version="1.0" id="mybus:DTA@Common_Resources">
					<Name>Common Resources</Name>
					<codespaces>
						<Codespace id="ntx">
							<Xmlns>ntx</Xmlns>
							<XmlnsUrl>http://netex.org.uk/</XmlnsUrl>
							<Description>Netex built in value</Description>
						</Codespace>
					</codespaces>
					<typesOfValue>
						<ValueSet version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:Types_of_Tariff" classOfValues="TypeOfTariff">
							<Name>Types of Tariff</Name>
							<values>
								<!--- ====Types OfTariff ========= -->
								<TypeOfTariff version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:Distance_kilometers">

								</TypeOfTariff>
								<TypeOfTariff version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:flat">
									<Name>Flat</Name>
								</TypeOfTariff>
								<TypeOfTariff version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:point_to_point">
									<Name>Point to point</Name>
								</TypeOfTariff>
								<TypeOfTariff version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:zone_to_zone">
									<Name>Zone to Zone</Name>

								<TypeOfTariff version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:zonal">
									<Name>Zonal</Name>
								</TypeOfTariff>

									<Name>Unit distance (count of stops, sections, zones)</Name>

								<TypeOfTariff version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:banded">
									<Name>Section</Name>
								</TypeOfTariff>
								<TypeOfTariff version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:stored_value">
									<Name>Stored value</Name>
								</TypeOfTariff>
								<TypeOfTariff version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:discount">
									<Name>Discount value</Name>

							</values>

						<ValueSet version="ntx:v1.0" id="ntx:Types_of_FareProduct" classOfValues="TypeOfFareProduct">
							<Name>Types of Fare Product</Name>

label: Rail RailCard MultipleProduct
xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!-- ==== Simple Railcard tarriff  Example ====== 
This example shows the encoding of a rail card with  discount rights  on purchase  of rail tickets in NeTex XML  
 
 There  are three types of rail card  , standard, senior and student  
 These  allow a discount on ticket  purchases
 
Fictional data

(C) CEN & Crown Copyright 2018, 2019 
Free to use under a Creative Commons license.

v1.1 Revised & corrected to use Tariff and simpler ids

===================================================
  
1. OVERVIEW
============
 
	Standard Rail card  has 5% discount  (Same dsicount  for adults and childrn) Available for 1 or 2 years
	Student  card has 20% discount   Available for 1  year only
	Senior  card has 20% discount    Available for 1 or 2 years
 
==================================
2. DETAILS

There is one Operator  :  DTA
 
There is one  FARE PRODUCT 

	 SALES DISCOUNT RIGHT  myfares:railcard@standard  
		VALIDITY PARAMETER ASSIGNMENTs
			OPERATOR mytoc:DTA
		FARE USAGE PARAMETERs 
			USER PROFILE - 1 myfares:standard

There are multiple SALES OFFF PACKAGES, one for each type of Railcard

	Student PREASSIGNED FARE PRODUCT myfares:railcard@student
		VALIDITY PARAMETER ASSIGNMENTs
			OPERATOR mytoc:DTA
		FARE USAGE PARAMETERs 
			USER PROFILE -   myfares:student
 
	PRices 
		FARE PRODUCT   PRICE :myfares:railcard@standard   5%
								 
		FARE PRODUCT   PRICE :myfares:railcard@student  > 10%
									 

A COMPOSITE FRAME is used to student the component FRAMEs
 
		A FARE FRAME is used to contain  the FARE    elements 
 		A RESOURCE is used to contain the TIME UNITs, etc

There is a TARIFF   myfares:Railcard_discount it has

      (a) Two TIME INTERVALS, each with a price  myfares:1year
			1 Step: TIME INTERVAL: myfares:1year 
			2 Steps: TIME INTERVAL: myfares:2year 

      (b) FARE STRUCTURE ELEMENTs  

		  (i) Access FARE STRUCTURE ELEMENTs for  scope - the    @access
				The operator and mode for whom products are availkable

		  (ii) Accesswehn FARE STRUCTURE ELEMENTs for  TIME   INTERVALs Time_interval@access_when
				 The Time Intervals

		  (iii) Eligibility FARE STRUCTURE ELEMENTs for  TIME   INTERVALs Time_interval@eligible
				 USER PROIFLEs for adult, child, student Senior

	 	(iiv) Conditions of Travel ARE STRUCTURE ELEMENT myfares:Time_interval@conditions_of_sale
 		 

There is a SINGLE FARE PRODUCT   myfares:Railcard 
    It has  a VALIDABLE ELEMENT to make a trip using the specified FARE STRUCTURE ELEMENTs

There are multiple SALES OFFET PACKAGES, one for each type of Railcard
		standard: myfares:Railcard-SOP@standard 
	    student:  myfares:Railcard-SOP@student  -  restricted to USER PROFILE student & TIEME INTERVAL 1 year
       senior:   myfares:Railcard-SOP@senior  - restricted to USER PROFILE senior  

There is a GROUP SALES OFFER PACKAGES, that specifies common properties
    Each has  a SALES OFFER PACKAGE  ELEMENT to make a trip using the specified FARE STRUCTURE ELEMENTs
  
There are is a PRICE GROUP with four  USAGE PARAMETER PRICes  , each with a  discounting price
 
			1  USER PROFILE: myfares:adult  		USAGE PARAMETER PRICE:  myfares:With_Railcard@adult 
			2  USER PROFILE: myfares:child  		USAGE PARAMETER PRICE:  myfares:With_Railcard@child
			3  USER PROFILE: myfares:student  		USAGE PARAMETER PRICE:  myfares:With_Railcard@student
			4  USER PROFILE: myfares:senior  		USAGE PARAMETER PRICE:  myfares:With_Railcard@senior


There are is a FARE TABLE with the prices for purchasing a   RAILCARD for various periods
 
It contains three nested tables one for each SALES OFFER PACKAGE 
 
        FARE TABLE for  Myfares:Railcard-SOP@standard 
			1  TIME INTERVAL: myfares:1year   		TIME INTERVALPRICE:  Myfares:Railcard-SOP@standard@1year
			2  TIME INTERVAL: myfares:2year   	TIME INTERVALPRICE:  mMyfares:Railcard-SOP@standard@2year
        FARE TABLE for  Myfares:Railcard-SOP@student 
			1  TIME INTERVAL: myfares:1year   		TIME INTERVALPRICE:  Myfares:Railcard-SOP@student@1year 
        FARE TABLE for  Myfares:Railcard-SOP@senior 
			1  TIME INTERVAL: myfares:1year   		TIME INTERVALPRICE:  Myfares:Railcard-SOP@senior@1year
			2  TIME INTERVAL: myfares:2year   	TIME INTERVALPRICE:  mMyfares:Railcard-SOP@senior@2year

A COMPOSITE FRAME is used to group the component FRAMEs
 
   - It has a VALIDITY CONDITION  that specifies it is valid from Jan to June
		 
		A FARE FRAME is used to contain  the FARE  product   elements 
		A separate FARE FRAME is used to contain  the FARE  price   elements 
 		A RESOURCE is used to contain the OPERATOR, etc
-->
<PublicationDelivery xmlns="http://www.netex.org.uk/netex" xmlns:siri="http://www.siri.org.uk/siri" xmlns:gml="http://www.opengis.net/gml/3.2" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" version="1.0" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.netex.org.uk/netex ../../../xsd/NeTEx_publication.xsd">
	<PublicationTimestamp>2010-12-17T09:30:47.0Z</PublicationTimestamp>
	<ParticipantRef>SYS001</ParticipantRef>
	<!--- ======WHAT WAS REQUESTED ========== -->
	<PublicationRequest version="1.0">
		<RequestTimestamp>2010-12-17T09:30:47.0Z</RequestTimestamp>
		<ParticipantRef>SYS002</ParticipantRef>
		<topics>
			<NetworkFrameTopic>
				<selectionValidityConditions>
					<AvailabilityCondition version="any" id="mytoc:range">
						<FromDate>2011-01-01T00:00:00Z</FromDate>
					</AvailabilityCondition>
				</selectionValidityConditions>
				<FareFrameRef ref="myfares:any">REQUEST</FareFrameRef>
			</NetworkFrameTopic>
		</topics>
	</PublicationRequest>
	<PublicationRefreshInterval>P1M</PublicationRefreshInterval>
	<Description>Example  of simple point to point fares</Description>
	<!--- =============== RESULTS =========== -->
	<dataObjects>
		<CompositeFrame version="1" id="myfares:DTA@RailCards">
			<validityConditions>
				<ValidBetween>
					<FromDate>2011-01-01T00:00:00Z</FromDate>
					<ToDate>2011-07-01T00:00:00Z</ToDate>
				</ValidBetween>
			</validityConditions>
			<!--- ======= CODESPACEs======== -->
			<codespaces>
				<Codespace id="mytoc">
					<Xmlns>mytoc</Xmlns>
					<XmlnsUrl>http://www.mytoc.eu/network</XmlnsUrl>
					<Description>My train operator</Description>
				</Codespace>
				<Codespace id="myfares">
					<Xmlns>myfares</Xmlns>
					<XmlnsUrl>http://www.mytoc.eu/fares</XmlnsUrl>
					<Description>Fare  data</Description>
				</Codespace>
			</codespaces>
			<FrameDefaults>
				<DefaultCurrency>EUR</DefaultCurrency>
			</FrameDefaults>
			<frames>
				<!--- =============== FAREs =========== -->
				<FareFrame version="1.0" id="myfares:DTA@RailCards@products">
					<prerequisites>
						<ResourceFrameRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:DTA@Common_Resources"/>
					</prerequisites>
					<!--- ====Fare Structure======= -->
					<tariffs>
						<Tariff version="1.0" id="myfares:Railcard_discount">
							<Name>Railcard Discount  tariff</Name>
							<OperatorRef version="any" ref="mytoc:DTA"/>
							<TypeOfTariffRef version="ntx:v1.0" ref="ntx:zonal"/>
							<timeIntervals>
								<TimeInterval version="1.0" id="myfares:Railcard_discount@1year">
									<Name>One Year</Name>
									<Duration>P1Y</Duration>
								</TimeInterval>
								<TimeInterval version="1.0" id="myfares:Railcard_discount@2year">
									<Name>Two Years</Name>
									<Duration>P2Y</Duration>
								</TimeInterval>
								<!--  installments -->
								<TimeInterval version="1.0" id="myfares:payment_installment@3month">
									<Duration>P3M</Duration>
								</TimeInterval>
								<TimeInterval version="1.0" id="myfares:payment_installment@6month">
									<Duration>P6M</Duration>
								</TimeInterval>
								<TimeInterval version="1.0" id="myfares:payment_installment@1year">
									<Name>One Year</Name>
									<Duration>P1Y</Duration>
								</TimeInterval>
							</timeIntervals>
							<fareStructureElements>
								<FareStructureElement version="1.0" id="myfares:Railcard_discount@access">
									<GenericParameterAssignment order="1" id="myfares:Flat@access" version="1.0">
										<TypeOfAccessRightAssignmentRef version="ntx:v1.0" ref="ntx:can_access"/>
										<ValidityParameterGroupingType>XOR</ValidityParameterGroupingType>
										<validityParameters>
											<VehicleModes>rail</VehicleModes>
											<OperatorRef version="any" ref="mytoc:DTA"/>
										</validityParameters>
									</GenericParameterAssignment>
								</FareStructureElement>
								<FareStructureElement version="1.0" id="myfares:Railcard_discount@access_when">
									<Name>Allowed periods for  use of a  Railcard</Name>
									<timeIntervals>
										<TimeIntervalRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:Railcard_discount@1year"/>
										<TimeIntervalRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:Railcard_discount@2year"/>
									</timeIntervals>
									<GenericParameterAssignment order="1" id="myfares:Time_interval@access_when" version="1.0">
										<TypeOfAccessRightAssignmentRef versionRef="fxc:v1.0" ref="fxc:can_access_when"/>
										<LimitationGroupingType>AND</LimitationGroupingType>
										<limitations>
											<UsageValidityPeriod version="1.0" id="myfares:Time_interval@access_whes">
												<ValidityPeriodType>seasonTicket</ValidityPeriodType>
												<UsageTrigger>specifiedStartDate</UsageTrigger>
												<UsageStartConstraintType>variable</UsageStartConstraintType>
												<startOnlyOn>
													<DayType id="myfares:Time_interval@access_when" version="1.0">
														<properties>
															<PropertyOfDay>
																<DayOfMonth>---01</DayOfMonth>
															</PropertyOfDay>
														</properties>
													</DayType>
												</startOnlyOn>
											</UsageValidityPeriod>
										</limitations>
									</GenericParameterAssignment>
								</FareStructureElement>
								<FareStructureElement version="1.0" id="myfares:Railcard_discount@can_purchase">
									<Name>Allowed periods for payment installationsd</Name>
									<timeIntervals>
										<TimeIntervalRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:payment_installment@3month"/>
										<TimeIntervalRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:payment_installment@6month"/>
										<TimeIntervalRef version="1.0" ref="myfares:payment_installment@1year"/>
									</timeIntervals>
